programme.desc: A home-makeover star is sent to her hometown to renovate a historic manor. An old flame is assigned to ensure her work preserves the history of the building and the two are forced to work closely together.

programme.title: Movie: From Friend to Fiancé
programme.desc: A quirky girl in her early 30's has it all, except the perfect man. Her childhood BFF wants her to be the best "man" at his wedding, but after spending time together planning his wedding to her former rival, she realizes he is the one she wants.

programme.title: South Park: Medicinal Fried Chicken
programme.desc: Cartman's favourite restaurant has been shut down and replaced by a store that sells medicinal marijuana. Randy is desperate to get a prescription card to buy pot and Cartman will do anything to get his beloved fried chicken back.

programme.title: South Park: Crippled Summer
programme.desc: Jimmy and Timmy head off to summer camp with all their handi-capable friends. When one of the camp counsellors, Towelie, falls off the wagon, the boys stage an intervention.

programme.title: South Park: Crème Fraiche
programme.desc: Stan's life is a shambles both at home and in school. Randy's obsession with the Food Network Is changing everything. It even forces Sharon to explore a new interest of her own.

programme.title: South Park: Crack Baby Athletic Association
programme.desc: Kyle gets in on the ground floor of Cartman's new business venture, The Crack Baby Athletic Association.

programme.title: South Park: City Sushi
programme.desc: Butters is diagnosed with multiple personality disorder. Meanwhile, the owner of City Wok is outraged when the town's newest business opens up next door.

programme.title: South Park: You're Getting Old
programme.desc: Just after Stan's tenth birthday, his worldviews start to change and so do his friendships.

programme.title: South Park: Ass Burgers
programme.desc: Cartman must find a way to deal with his Asperger's Syndrome.

programme.title: South Park: The Last of the Meheecans
programme.desc: Cartman joins the U.S. Border Patrol.

programme.title: South Park: Bass to Mouth
programme.desc: The kids' most scandalous secrets are being leaked on an outrageous new gossip website.

programme.title: South Park: Broadway Bro Down
programme.desc: After Randy takes Sharon to see a hit musical, he becomes Broadway's biggest fan.

programme.title: South Park: The Poor Kid
programme.desc: Kenny ends up in the foster care system after his parents are arrested.

programme.title: South Park: Faith Hilling
programme.desc: The kids are in danger when new trends start to evolve and shift at a rapid pace.

programme.title: South Park: Butterballs
programme.desc: Butters is the victim of an unlikely bully.

programme.title: Lights Out With David Spade: Joel McHale, Maria Bamford and Erik Griffin
programme.desc: Panelists Joel McHale, Maria Bamford and Erik Griffin join David Spade to talk about the latest in pop culture.

programme.title: The Jim Jefferies Show: September 17. 2019
programme.desc: Jefferies covers the top stories of the week and takes viewers around the globe.

programme.title: South Park: Rainforest Shmainforest
programme.desc: The boys travel to the Costa Rican rainforest as a part of the 'Getting Gay with Kids' choir tour.

programme.title: South Park: A Ladder to Heaven
programme.desc: Kenny died with the winning ticket to a prize of endless candy in his pocket. The boys decide to build a ladder to Heaven where they expect to find him and get the ticket back. The Feds think Saddam may be hiding weapons in Heaven and plan to bomb it.

programme.title: South Park: Best Friends Forever
programme.desc: When Kenny meets with an unfortunate accident, Cartman lobbies to let Kenny die so he can get what Kenny left to him in Kenny's will. Meanwhile, Kenny is called upon to fight against the forces of Satan in heaven using his PSP skills.

programme.title: South Park: The Red Badge of Gayness
programme.desc: Cartman has visions of glory as he suits up for the Confederacy in the annual re-enactment of a Civil War battle, and leads the drunken rebels to defeat the union. When they aren't satisfied with just the town, they move to take back the entire country.

programme.title: South Park: The Biggest Douche in the Universe
programme.desc: When a famous psychic fails to help him exorcise Kenny from his body, Cartman and Chef travel to the moors of Scotland, where Chef's mom tries a little of her voodoo magic on him.

programme.title: South Park: Whale Whores
programme.desc: Stan takes action to stop the Japanese from killing the world's whales and dolphins.

programme.title: South Park: Poor and Stupid

programme.desc: When the head of the Coors Brewing Company is kidnapped and held for ransom, it kicked off one of the most intense manhunts in American history. See how forensic science helped track down the kidnappers.

programme.desc: When an attractive young Missouri woman is found dead in her apartment, police meticulously generate a suspect list a mile long. The culprit turns out to be the most unlikely suspect with an insatiable lust for power and control.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Safe Place

programme.title: Forensic Files: Live Wire
programme.desc: A thin piece of wire and some cryptic numbers on a sales receipt held the key to a brutal and senseless murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unholy Alliance

programme.title: Forensic Files: Quite a Spectacle

programme.desc: When a dedicated, well-respected teacher disappeared, police had to determine if she'd gone on vacation without telling anyone, or if she was the victim of foul play. Investigators turned to forensic science, hoping to find the answers they needed.

programme.desc: Two young women are killed by a mysterious intruder. Investigators hope that his unusual brand of cigarettes and new advances in DNA technology can paint a picture of a killer.

programme.desc: When a prominent criminal defence attorney is found murdered in his own home, police suspect it may have come at the hands of one of his questionable clientele.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Impression
programme.desc: For sixteen years, a woman's death was considered an accident. Until someone called the authorities suggesting it was murder-- and turned up dead themselves.

programme.title: Forensic Files: As the Tide Turns
programme.desc: A woman is found dead. A man's version of events was at variance with the evidence, so investigators turned to forensic science, hoping to determine if this was a botched robbery, or cold-blooded murder.

programme.desc: When a bicycle rider is struck and fatally injured in a hit-and-run accident, forensic investigators utilize an assortment of miniscule clues to determine the identity of the offending vehicle and eventually the person who was driving it.

programme.desc: JJ decides to invite the best racers from the West to meet up in Las Vegas for a winner-take-all arm drop race, with $30,000 on the line.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Road Rascals: Same Side Showdown
programme.desc: As the Las Vegas competition winds down, Memphis is forced to line up against each other to see who can take home the $30,000 prize.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Road Rascals: Grudge Racing
programme.desc: When Doughboy gets a $10,000 callout from the 901 Bad Boyz, another group of racers in Memphis, JJ gathers the family to stand up to the racers.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Get That Money Out Sucka
programme.desc: Memphis starts the racing season against racers from Illinois, but rain comes and ends the night. JJ sets up another race night with an unfriendly group from Detroit. They make a bet that whichever city is first to win 7 races, wins the total $20,000.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: No Second Chances
programme.desc: The Monkeys put the pedal to the metal in their final attempt to finish the '72 Buick Riviera super-build in time for SEMA. The team's integrity is on the line and $300,000 has been invested so failure is not an option.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Holy Grail Firebirds, Part II
programme.desc: With a 10K-a-day penalty looming, Richard can't afford to lose any more time on the two Firebirds' concourse restoration, but by the end of the project, the garage will be short two Monkeys. Richard flips a '49 Mercury that comes complete with passenger.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Memphis: Get That Money Out Sucka
programme.desc: Memphis starts the racing season against racers from Illinois, but rain comes and ends the night. JJ sets up another race night with an unfriendly group from Detroit. They make a bet that whichever city is first to win 7 races, wins the total $20,000.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: No Second Chances
programme.desc: The Monkeys put the pedal to the metal in their final attempt to finish the '72 Buick Riviera super-build in time for SEMA. The team's integrity is on the line and $300,000 has been invested so failure is not an option.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Jacked-Up Jeep
programme.desc: Aaron and the Gas Monkey crew overhaul a Jeep in 24 hours to surprise a friend. Richard flips a funky gull-winged Bricklin. Daphne convinces a reluctant Richard to hire his nephew. Dennis and Richard argue over how best to sell their COPO Camaros.

programme.title: Moonshiners: From the Flames
programme.desc: Josh must make good with a biker gang after a trailer fire leaves them empty handed. Tickle's first run of legal rye whisky tempts him to return to the illegal side. In Louisiana, a sassafras shine experiment puts a massive waterborne delivery at risk.

programme.title: Moonshiners: High and Dry
programme.desc: Josh turns moonshine mad scientist for his biker gang sale. Old-timer JB saves Mark and Digger's three-pot run. Night-time boat sale in the Gulf set a new bar for bootlegging. Tim, Tickle, Mark and Digger go unfiltered on the crazy life of shine.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Lighted Up
programme.desc: Mark and Digger confront a shiner who's been edging into their territory. Red and blue lights flash, and Josh makes a split second decision. Lance hopes a big sale could rectify past bootlegging blunders while Mike risks his sale, reputation and freedom.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Not a Crook
programme.desc: Tim considers a permanent role for Tickle at the Distillery, while Sondra convinces Chico that a unique recipe will seal their season. Lance surprises Jeff with an unorthodox moonshine ingredient, and Patti and David risk a supersized mega run.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Foraging for a Long Winter Ahead
programme.desc: In Tennessee, Mike sets himself up for a career-high with a run of specialty liquor but faces a devastating setback. In the last run of the season, Sondra takes the reigns and Rodgers tempers his final run in an attempt to cash out.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Last Nail in the Coffin
programme.desc: With his season at stake Josh hopes to unload 175 gallons of plum brandy. Mark and Digger hit the road to bootleg in ghoulish fashion. Patti and David head to the gulf for the biggest sale of their season and Tickle starts a new job and ends an old habit.

programme.title: Undercover Billionaire: House of Cards
programme.desc: Glenn doubles down on his million-dollar idea with a bold new plan to expand the business. But in the midst of making deals, Glenn's confronted with the prospect of losing all of his start-up funds, leaving him fighting to keep the dream alive.

programme.title: Undercover Billionaire: No Pain, No Gain
programme.desc: With his team depending on him, Glenn loses a critical deal and is sent spinning. As the pressure mounts, the underdogs rally to flip a house that could save the business and change their lives forever.

programme.title: Undercover Billionaire: Exposed
programme.desc: The Underdog BBQ team races to prepare for their opening day, but when Glenn accidentally reveals his true identity to a team member, it puts the entire business and the bet in jeopardy.

programme.title: Undercover Billionaire: Trial by Fire
programme.desc: Glenn sinks everything into Underdog BBQ's big debut and first chance to make money. But before the cash register even opens, the team's plan goes up in flames, threatening the future of the company before the 90-day deadline.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Broken Bones
programme.desc: Parker crashes a boat resulting in a terrible injury. Frozen ground and machine failure threaten Rick's season. Tony and family finally rebuild his second dredge.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Make it Rain

programme.title: Gold Rush: Big Red Is Dead

programme.title: The Little Couple: Let's Have a Bravo to Dad!

programme.title: The Little Couple: This Is How a Dude Does It

programme.title: The Little Couple: Surprise!

programme.title: Kids Behind Bars: Life or Parole: Aaron
programme.desc: On January 31, 2011, 14-year-old Aaron shot his neighbor, 14-year-old Alana, in her home in Harlem, Georgia. Aaron was sentenced to life without parole at 15, but now 21-year-old Aaron is appealing his sentence.

programme.title: Kids Behind Bars: Life or Parole: James
programme.desc: On November 24, 1990, 15-year-old James killed his stepmother and three young brothers with a shotgun, and then set their rural Wyoming home on fire.

programme.title: Kids Behind Bars: Life or Parole: Otis
programme.desc: On March 31, 1998 in Albany, Georgia, 16-year-old Otis broke into Valerie's home and allegedly tried to rob her. During the attempt, Valerie and her 16-year-old daughter, Valene, were shot. Valerie dies weeks later and her daughter was disfigured.

programme.title: Kids Behind Bars: Life or Parole: Brandon
programme.desc: On August 21, 2001, a group of teens, including 15-year-old Brandon, kidnapped and raped Melissa, a 21-year-old college student in Youngstown, Ohio.

programme.title: The First 48: Easy Money/ Ambushed
programme.desc: Young father shot in the back in Dallas, but no one wants to talk; later in Cleveland, brazen corner store stickup leaves innocent clerk dead.

programme.title: The First 48: The Fighter/ Final Ride
programme.desc: A young father and his friends are ambushed in a parked car in New Orleans. In Atlanta, tenants from the same apartment complex face off, leaving a promising boxer dead and his brother bent on revenge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: Four friends compete to embarrass each other in the ultimate hidden camera showdown.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers

programme.title: Impractical Jokers

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Spider Man
programme.desc: The guys give all-you-can eat buffet customers all they can handle, and turn into real power tools while teaching workshops at a hardware store. Then, tonight's big loser suffers a punishment that will make your skin crawl.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Stage Fright
programme.desc: The guys serve up raw deals at a pawn shop counter and try to convince strangers to give them hugs. Plus, tonight's loser performs his life story through song.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Training Day
programme.desc: The guys go to a supermarket with bells on and try to reminisce with strangers in the park. Plus, tonight's three losers are put through an epic trial by fire.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Swim Shady
programme.desc: The guys hit some bad reception working at a desk. Plus, tonight's big loser takes photos of a water aerobics class, but ends up drowning in shame.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Catastrophe
programme.desc: The guys serve up the goods at a juice bar, and tonight's loser confronts his biggest fear in a punishment that leaves him practically catatonic.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Vampire Weakened
programme.desc: The guys act frosty while working the ice cream counter, then take Joe's dogs for a romp in the park with help from some strangers. Later, tonight's loser watches his blood boil while performing with a gospel choir.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Sitcom
programme.desc: Adam tackles classic television stereotypes, from the racism behind public pools, to the 'model minority' myth of Asian Americans, to the on-screen toxic masculinity that's masking the problems young men face today.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Games
programme.desc: Adam hits pause on the myth that connects video games to real-life violence, and reveals that Monopoly was a rip-off of an anti-capitalist teaching game. Plus, Olympic organizers get rich while athletes struggle to get by.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Plate of Nachos
programme.desc: Adam dishes out the facts on the avocado trade being ruled by drug cartels, and big pork making bacon a pop culture hit while covering up its huge health risks. Plus, America's food problems stem from corn.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Full Mental Jacket

programme.desc: Brooke and Kevin meet their toughest challenge yet when they use hacks to game a polygraph test, and Kevin learns how to defend himself with a smartphone.

programme.desc: When Savannah makes a proposal to Todd, one that would allow her go to college a year early, he wages an all-out family competition to keep her at home as long as possible, and Chase pays the price by having Todd as his ACT coach.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: 50 Shades of Faye

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Winter's Wrath

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: The Dogs That Stole Our Hearts

programme.title: Lone Star Law: The Eagle Has Landed

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Run and You're Done

programme.desc: A wealthy businessman hires a free-spirited call girl to be his companion for a week. Slowly they draw things from each other and from within themselves that make them hope against their own sceptical nature for a fairy tale ending.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Lighted Up

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Whitney and Bre
programme.desc: Whitney met Brenell on an LBGT site four years ago and is head-over-heels in love, even though Brenell refuses to video chat with her. Whitney is desperate to find out why and hopes that what she knows about Brenell is true.

programme.desc: Tia, her kids and the extended Villalobos family reveal the behind the scenes stories of the dogs that have stolen their hearts over the years.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Golden Girl
programme.desc: Mariah faces a challenging rescue when she realizes the dog in danger is deaf. Former adopters come back to Villalobos set on adopting a special needs dog. And the rescue struggles to track down a dog's owner because of outdated microchip information.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: The Eagle Has Landed
programme.desc: Across the state, Texas game wardens are busy enforcing fish and game law. An injured bald eagle needs medical attention. Game wardens go undercover to catch someone selling illegal alligator parts. A tip leads to an angler with multiple undersized fish.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Run and You're Done
programme.desc: It's dove season in Texas, the start of hunting season. In Beaumont, road hunters get an early start on deer season during a decoy sting. Near Texarkana, a rogue gator is lassoed. On the Gulf Coast, undersized angling means citations.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: UFO Tech
programme.desc: Technology has transformed the way we live with artificial intelligence, high-energy laser, antigravity technology and alien-looking aircraft. We discuss if these advances are due to human effort or contact with UFOs.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Police UFO Files
programme.desc: Using archival audio recordings, official transcripts and incident reports, UFO researchers investigate what really happened during incredible and sometimes life-threatening encounters between law enforcement and UFOs.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Nazi UFO Secrets
programme.desc: Shocking evidence reveals the development of secret Nazi weapons not long after an alleged UFO crashed in Germany's Black Forest. UFO experts investigate whether the US government co-opted this technology for our own space and military programs.

programme.title: Contact: Alien Evidence
programme.desc: Experts deploy CIA-developed link analysis software, special ops intelligence training and boots-on-the-ground journalism to determine if aliens have made contact with Earth.

programme.title: Contact: Declassified Breakthrough
programme.desc: A breakthrough linking UFOs and seismic activity leads Nick and Sarah to alien evidence in a remote jungle in Mexico. Paul and Kawa investigate an encounter captured by military cameras and gain unprecedented access to foreign government files.

programme.title: Contact: Deep State
programme.desc: Link analysis patterns lead Nick and Sarah to a site where they uncover ancient evidence of human contact with aliens. Investigating Argentina's most credible military encounter, Paul and Kawa track down an eyewitness and the unexpected presence of NASA.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Saturn's Moon Monsters
programme.desc: When NASA discovers something strange on Saturn's biggest moon, experts investigate if aliens feeding on the world's electric atmosphere could be the culprit. The disturbing evidence points to a grisly apocalypse if these monsters ever make it to Earth.

programme.title: Contact: Alien Mysteries: Are We Alone?
programme.desc: A team of experts use the latest science and cutting-edge technology to investigate if extraterrestrial life has contacted humankind, and what they discover could reveal if there's an international conspiracy to cover it all up.

programme.title: Contact: Alien Mysteries: Hunt for the Alien Relics
programme.desc: New clues suggest that aliens were in contact with the ancient cultures of Mesoamerica, and to prove it, a team of experts hunt down mysterious artifacts that could change everything we know about our place in the cosmos.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Saturn's Moon Monsters
programme.desc: When NASA discovers something strange on Saturn's biggest moon, experts investigate if aliens feeding on the world's electric atmosphere could be the culprit. The disturbing evidence points to a grisly apocalypse if these monsters ever make it to Earth.

programme.title: Contact: Alien Mysteries: War on the Amazon
programme.desc: A remote island on the Amazon is the site of an alleged alien attack, and a team of experts use the latest tech and first-hand testimony to investigate what really happened during this sinister incident.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Nazi Death Star
programme.desc: A Nazi fortress that could have changed history if it was finished, an underwater graveyard of unexpected American treasures, and a network of tunnels hiding a secret history of New York were abandoned for mysterious reasons, and experts investigate why.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Nazi Ghost Town
programme.desc: Revisit a Soviet megastructure, a massive Nazi brainwashing complex, and a dangerous desert pass to find out how they were built and why they were mysteriously abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Wild West Apocalypse
programme.desc: Some of the world's most incredible engineering projects are now deserted. Explore what happened to a massive military site that was once a hotbed for nuclear testing, a top secret airbase hidden inside a mountain, and an otherworldly power plant.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of Hell Island
programme.desc: Explore a ghost town that was once a dangerous industrial hellscape, a giant warship at the bottom of the ocean, and a top secret relic that could have changed the Cold War.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Nightmare on Blood Mountain
programme.desc: A ghost ship thousands of miles away from where anyone expected, a bridge to nowhere in Florida's Hurricane Alley, and a haunting mountain complex with a bloody secret are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Conspiracy on Devil's Mountain
programme.desc: A secret structure on a sinister mountain, an industrial compound swallowed by a forest, and a mysterious run in a sand dune are strange deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Tower of Death
programme.desc: Revealing how an alien Nazi structure that changed history, a strange Soviet monolith known as the Tower of Death, and a concrete ocean giant were built, and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of the Haunted Prison

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of the Alien Shrine
programme.desc: A strange alien shrine on a mountain peak, a bridge built in the Alaskan wilderness, and an American castle with a dangerous secret are mysterious deserted engineering projects and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Real Shawshank
programme.desc: An eerie prison with a dark past that became the setting of an iconic Hollywood movie and alien monoliths on a strange and remote island are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Armageddon Highway
programme.desc: A strange Cuban prison, an eerie escape route built for Armageddon, and an underwater marvel that changed history are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Town That Disappeared
programme.desc: A haunted lighthouse on Lake Michigan, a town where everyone seems to have vanished all at once, and a secret complex of tunnels beneath London.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Underwater Ghost Prison
programme.desc: An entrance to the underworld in the American wild, a haunting Soviet underwater prison, and a strange complex of towers in a forest of ice are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Dallas SWAT
programme.desc: Memorial Day weekend erupts when SWAT is called in to subdue a home intruder, whose startling method of entry leaves the team scratching their heads. An alleged heroin dealer is scoped out by an officer who's on a mission to put him out of business.

programme.title: The Big House: Kentucky State Penitentiary
programme.desc: Cameras follow an officer on his shift and step inside the Kentucky State Pen high security block.

programme.title: The Big House: Leavenworth
programme.desc: An exclusive look at America's first federal prison. Operating since 1895, Leavenworth has had its share of notoriety - from The Birdman of Alcatraz and exciting escapes to bloody riots and escalating violence.

programme.title: The Big House: Colorado State
programme.desc: Filmmakers explore one of America's harshest security facilities and its rich past.

programme.title: The Big House: Central Prison
programme.desc: Central Prison in Raleigh, is the first stop for all of North Carolina's male felons with sentences of 20 years or longer. Today, Central is a modern state-of-the-art prison, but it began as a dark dungeon built nearly 120 years ago.

programme.title: Fugitive Chronicles: Danny Ray Horning

programme.title: Fugitive Chronicles: Nichols

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: Daddy's Girls

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: The Secrets You Keep

programme.title: Blood Relatives: Darkness Before Don
programme.desc: The Blue Ridge Mountains of North Carolina make a perfect backdrop--for murder. Pillars of the community are pulled into a nightmare when affairs, abuse and embezzlement lead to someone losing their head.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Black Pearl
programme.desc: Tammy Ellis likes bad boys and charismatic loner David Gatlin is right up her street. After a quickie marriage, David's dark history is revealed; an attempted divorce is the catalyst for a terrifying and bloody confrontation.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Death in the Family
programme.desc: Kraig and Karen Kahler enjoyed a life of influence and privilege, but sexual obsession spun out of control and destroyed everything.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Murder, Modesty, and the Pastor
programme.desc: Corinne isn't a demanding woman - she just wants what many lonely people want: a second chance at love. And when she meets Calvin Stoudt she finally gets it. But a too-close roommate and a monstrous past turn this second chance into a deadly battleground.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love of Money
programme.desc: These Deadly Women sacrificed their loved ones to satisfy their 'Love of Money.'

programme.title: Deadly Women: Mom's Money
programme.desc: Most children value their mother's enduring love, but few are only concerned with a different kind of maternal support: money. These Deadly Women prove all they care about is ''Mom's Money''.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Love Leaves Town
programme.desc: With hearts of stone, these Deadly Women give their men special send-offs when 'Love Leaves Town.'

programme.title: Deadly Women: Lover Makes Three
programme.desc: Sometimes the love of one person isn't satisfying.

programme.title: Murder Among Friends: The Rabbit Hole
programme.desc: In Bellevue, Washington, a teenager is found slain in a local park. As those closest to the victim lead investigators down the rabbit hole, a conspiracy is slowly unearthed, revealing this victim isn't the only one with a target on her back.

programme.title: Murder Among Friends: Dead Lift
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, five teenagers work out constantly to reach their peak physiques. But when the crew's strongest member is found dead and buried in the desert, his best friends become suspects in the murder.

programme.title: Murder Among Friends: The Rabbit Hole

programme.desc: 26-year-old car dealer Christopher O'Brien takes a strange man for a test drive and never returns. Did O'Brien's criminal past finally catch up with him? Or is the truth something more sinister?

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Devil Incarnate

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Mexican Godfather

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Operation White Terror

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Missing Masterpiece
programme.desc: The painting 'Portrait of a Young Man' by Raphael, is the most valuable piece of art stolen by the Nazis.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Blood Treasure

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: City of Loot
programme.desc: The team investigates the systematic looting of Paris during four years of Nazi occupation and tracks missing treasures to Berlin and Switzerland.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Stealing Italy

programme.title: Legends of the West: Bass Reeves: The Real Lone Ranger

programme.title: Legends of the West: Deacon Jim Miller: The Pious Assassin

programme.desc: An engaged couple with a passion for flipping takes on a pair of stylish soulmates to see who can flip their flea market finds for the most profit.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Fired Up Tiny Tornadoes
programme.desc: A pair of flipping firemen are ready to take down a fiery duo known as the 'Tiny Tornadoes' in a competition to see whose flipping skills rake in the most profit.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Don't Mess With Texas
programme.desc: Two New Yorkers face off against a Texas duo in a contest to see who can attract more customers with their unique flips.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Lucky Flipping Pennies
programme.desc: Crafty couple Dana and Mike go up against a pair of fearless friends, Kristin and Michele, to complete three challenges from the Flip List.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Too Hot to Flip?
programme.desc: Married flippers Jon and Carol face off against flipping friends Bethany and David.

programme.title: Flea Market Flip: Nothing But Net Profit
programme.desc: Two college buddies are ready to throw down against a duo of fired-up best friends known as the Workshop Warriors to see who can create the most profitable flip.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: Making New Family Memories in Rural Texas
programme.desc: For the first time ever on Fixer Upper, the tables are turned for Chip and Joanna. Instead of taking potential homebuyers on a tour of houses, this time it's the clients who are showing them a house.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: Active Baby Boomers Seek Sanctuary Near Nature
programme.desc: A baby boomer couple fell in love later in life but are young at heart seeking a home that will fit their active lifestyle.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: First Time Buyers Take a Chance on a Vintage Fixer Upper
programme.desc: Chip and Joanna Gaines take Kelsey and Trip Purks on a tour through three classic homes in the historic Dean Highland neighborhood of Waco, Texas.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: Newlyweds Take on a Run-Down Fixer for Their Future Together
programme.desc: Ken and Kelly Downs are a recently wed couple looking for a home they can both call their own.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: After Recent Adoption, Family Finds Space to Thrive
programme.desc: Keith and Annabeth recently adopted two girls and are hoping to find a house in an area where their family can have space to grow and enjoy the outdoors. Their all-in budget is $175,000 and with Chip and Jo's help, they hope to find a 3-4 bedroom house.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Hawaiian Hideaway
programme.desc: Innovative designer and builder Graham Hill sets out to transform a steep Maui jungle plot into a 600-square-foot, hi-tech dream home with multiple moving walls and other space-maximizing features.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Island Oasis
programme.desc: Beth wants a beach getaway on the white sandy beaches of Ambergris Caye, Belize. Ken Grissom and his crew transport building materials to the remote island and construct an off-the-grid luxury getaway with the Caribbean water just steps away.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Volcano Home
programme.desc: A couple builds a rainforest retreat within the edge of an active volcano on Hawaii's Big Island.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Piña Pool-ada
programme.desc: Lucas creates a tropical oasis complete with an island, a large grotto rock and a Tiki-themed cabana.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Splash of Hawaii
programme.desc: A couple that moved from Hawaii to take care of a family member in Texas wants to recreate their outdoor lanai lifestyle. Justin McGuire and Steve Terry must use everything they have to turn their rocky Austin hilltop into a tropical paradise.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Broken to Beautiful
programme.desc: After living with a broken pool for four years, a family decides to build their dream pool again. Brian and Paul Porter give them an out-of-this-world creation, featuring a waterfall wall, sunken fire pit and poolside spa.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Castle by the Sea
programme.desc: Lucas faces an epic challenge building a pool fit for a Roman palace on the Gulf of Mexico. Lucas journeys far outside his comfort zone and even taps Emperor Caesar for help on his quest to fulfill his clients' dream of living in a castle by the sea.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Lazy River Runs Through It
programme.desc: Lucas and crew build their first lazy river! This private lazy river circumnavigates a real island, massive waterfalls and a giant grotto. Lucas kicks it up several notches with a state of the art audio/ video system, outdoor kitchen and special surprise!

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Splash of Hawaii
programme.desc: A couple that moved from Hawaii to take care of a family member in Texas wants to recreate their outdoor lanai lifestyle. Justin McGuire and Steve Terry must use everything they have to turn their rocky Austin hilltop into a tropical paradise.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Piña Pool-ada
programme.desc: Lucas creates a tropical oasis complete with an island, a large grotto rock and a Tiki-themed cabana.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Hit Properties With Nathan Morris: Multi-Platinum Property
programme.desc: Together with contractor Bryant Gipson, Nathan's attempting to turn a neglected country club mansion outside Orlando into a magnificent, modern estate worth over $3 million.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Sight Unseen: Open Kitchen
programme.desc: The kitchen was originally designed as a place for servants to work and eat, but Wes and Carre remodel it to make it functional for modern-day use.

programme.title: Docked Out: Driftwood Dock: Custom Waterfront Living
programme.desc: The crew builds a massive two-storey dock that incorporates elements of the existing home and the river itself. The crew also builds a swim step, one-of-a-kind furniture made from driftwood pieces and a custom upper level with a view.

programme.title: Lawn and Order: Slippery Slope
programme.desc: With an upcoming move fast approaching, a couple with three boys needs to put their home on the market as soon as possible. Their sloped yard and aging features aren't helping, so Chris and Sara stretch their bucket to get the value up.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Greek Revival Farmhouse
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs preserve a Greek Rival farm house in Bentleyville, Pennsylvania. Main salvage items include mantles, tiles and a full-sized chicken coop.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Pickle Mansion
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs head to Knoxville, Tennessee, in hopes of salvaging the crumbling Pickle Mansion. The main items of interest are a copper frieze and columns. Mike discovers a fuel drop tank and he and Tay build a dresser kitchen island.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Free Will House
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawg team travels to Free Will House in Huntington, West Virginia, where they salvage a bathtub, sitz bath and kitchen cabinets.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Grace Family Church
programme.desc: The Black Dog Salvage crew travels to Vinton, Virginia, in order to salvage a massive piece of stained glass from the Grace Family Church. They run into challenges when equipment is delayed.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Texas Tavern Sign
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs work at home in Roanoke, Virginia, where they salvage a sign for the Texas Tavern and learn the history of the local restaurant over burgers and bowls of chili.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Blacksburg Barn
programme.desc: The dawgs head to Blacksburg, Virginia, to salvage an 1800s barn with an internal log structure. It should be an easy job, but a hurricane on the horizon means a tighter deadline to make it out before the storm arrives.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Lexington Storefront
programme.desc: The crew take a stab at a refurbished storefront in historic downtown Lexington, Virginia. This second-generation salvage requires a lot of finesse, as the building is being renovated rather than destroyed. Windowpanes become a room divider.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Barnesville House
programme.desc: The dawgs tackle Ohio's cold and snowy winter to salvage an old Italiante house that's beaming with character. Back in the shop, things heat up as Tay comes up with a plan to use old pulleys as the legs for a unique table.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Dayton Mill Power Plant
programme.desc: The team organizes a dawg vs. dawg build competition after Mike and Robert get a tip on an abandoned power plant from an old client in South Carolina. The winner of the contest is a tough call as both teams' pieces are rooted in the original aesthetic.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Timberville House
programme.desc: The dawgs salvage a 1900s farmhouse in the heart of the Shenandoah Valley. Along with the usual doors and hardware, they find ornate ceiling medallions, a clawfoot tub and pine flooring. A built-in cabinet yields a potential treasure.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Return to Cap Centre
programme.desc: The crew take a second stab at the Boulevard at Capital Centre. This time, they bring home finds from a Japanese restaurant, a bank and a spa, including shoji screens and bullet-resistant plexiglass. Back home they complete a build for a dear friend.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Bluefield House
programme.desc: The crew deliver a large lamppost that will serve as the focal point of a new community space. Before taking on this project, the team visits the Bluefield House in West Virginia to find classic commodities needed to restock the warehouse.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Alexandria Church
programme.desc: The crew go to salvage a church where they must save everything from contemporary pews to a commercial grade sink. However, the team must get creative as they are met with heights, narrow hallways and perplexing waterlines.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Return to Barnesville
programme.desc: The crew pick through a barn and take on a Queen Anne-style home in Barnesville, Ohio, looking for some bonus finds. Mike Whiteside meets with a return client who has an idea for a dining table set made from canning baskets and live edge wood.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Baltimore Fireboat
programme.desc: After a call from their old friend, Captain Tim, the crew travels to Norfolk, Virginia, to salvage a fireboat from Baltimore. When they return to the shop, Mike and Tay enlist the help of a local coppersmith to fashion unique foot baths for Hotel Roanoke.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Boulevard at Capital Centre
programme.desc: The crew get a huge opportunity in suburban Washington, D.C. where they work on the former site of the Capital Centre. The arena was demolished in 2002, but is just now being redeveloped. Later, Tay builds a breakfast table out of a car engine.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Laverock Hill Estate
programme.desc: The crew heads to Glenside, PA to salvage a huge estate. The sprawling mansion gives the Dawgs a run for their money as they try to save columns, doors, mantles, bathtubs and more. Mike and Tay visit Rural Retreat to find a piece for a coffee table.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship: Monster Mania
programme.desc: A monster has ransacked the kitchen and is on the loose! The bakers work together in the pre-heat challenge to create a 3-D suspect sketch out of pate a choux to help track him down.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship: Hallowedding
programme.desc: It's bridal season for Halloween lovers and since bridal showers often have petit fours, the bakers are creating "petit horrors" in the pre-heat challenge. In the main heat, it's time for a Halloween wedding!

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship: Circus of Dread
programme.desc: A group of talented bakers enter the fortune-telling tent at the circus of dread in the pre-heat challenge. The competitors are tasked with creating tarot card desserts featuring blood orange, fig or passion fruit.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship: Cranium Epicurean
programme.desc: Inspired by a mysterious 'skull man,' the bakers enter the graveyard to bring skull desserts to life in the pre-heat.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship: Halloween Invasion
programme.desc: John Henson kicks off the competition by revealing all the skeletons in his family's closet to inspire the eight bakers as they make scary skeleton desserts.

programme.title: Halloween Cake-Off: It's Alive
programme.desc: Host Duff Goldman kicks off this unconventional competition with the first challenge, in which the four bakers must create Halloween-themed cakes that incorporate a surprise selection of candies and treats.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship: Best of Halloween Baking Championship
programme.desc: Comedian John Henson takes a sugar-fueled look back at some of the most outrageous moments and disgustingly delicious desserts of Halloween Baking Championship, including creepy-crawly critters, bloodiest baking and spine-tingling ingredients.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship: Halloween Invasion
programme.desc: John Henson kicks off the competition by revealing all the skeletons in his family's closet to inspire the eight bakers as they make scary skeleton desserts.

programme.title: Halloween Cake-Off: It's Alive

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship: Best of Halloween Baking Championship
programme.desc: Comedian John Henson takes a sugar-fueled look back at some of the most outrageous moments and disgustingly delicious desserts of Halloween Baking Championship, including creepy-crawly critters, bloodiest baking and spine-tingling ingredients.

programme.title: Halloween Baking Championship: Cranium Epicurean
programme.desc: Inspired by a mysterious 'skull man,' the bakers enter the graveyard to bring skull desserts to life in the pre-heat.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Feisty Fiesta
programme.desc: It's a Frozen Food Feud for the first game as the chefs race to gather ingredients for a seafood dish. In the second game, the chefs get Guy's Grocery List and must incorporate all the ingredients, including soy sauce, into their Mexican dish.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: 16-Minute Chicken
programme.desc: It's all about chicken as Ree Drummond whips up four speedy 16-minute meals. First, her Buffalo chicken burgers are perfect when time is short and hungry teenagers are waiting.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Book and Wine Club
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood and her sister, Beth, get ready for their book club! First, Beth heads to a local bookstore, where she runs into bestselling author, Ann Patchett.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Tour Favorites
programme.desc: Trisha's center stage with her backup singer, Robert Bailey! She recalls one of her favorite food stops in Portland, Ore. and creates a menu based on her experience, including filthy dirty martinis with blue cheese-stuffed olive.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Trisha's Spicy Kitchen
programme.desc: After chowing down on some delicious but fiery hot chicken from Prince's Hot Chicken Shack, Trisha and her friend Julie make some spicy specialties, including chipotle peanuts and South tex-mex rice.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Seeing Double
programme.desc: Trisha celebrates her wax figure being inducted into Nashville's Madame Tussauds Wax Museum. The menu includes ingredients that are used in at least two ways, including Pork Tenderloin with Bacon Onion Jam and Apple Cider and Sautéed Apple Basmati rice.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Love For Loveless Cafe
programme.desc: One of Trisha Yearwood's favorite spots in Nashville is The Loveless Cafe. She spends the day putting a spin on her favorite dishes from the restaurant.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: New Mom Life
programme.desc: Molly Yeh makes quick and easy recipes that let her spend more time enjoying her life as a new mom. She starts off with savory Green Pancakes for lunch, and then she's in dinner mode with a hearty Funeral Hotdish and a crunchy Romaine Salad.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Night Out Night In
programme.desc: With the kids out on the town at a street party, Ree Drummond and Ladd enjoy a night in. They're cooking surf and turf skewers with Cajun hollandaise, a romaine wedge salad with loaded ranch dressing and rummy pineapples and cream to keep things sweet.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Big House Clear Up
programme.desc: It's a big day of cleaning up the homestead with a massive bonfire to round it all off after an alfresco dinner.

programme.title: Supermarket Stakeout: You Wanna 'Pizza' Me?
programme.desc: Alex Guarnaschelli challenges four chefs to think outside of the pizza box as they stake out shoppers at Bristol Farms market in Calabasas, California.

programme.title: Chopped Junior: Cookie Jar Spar
programme.desc: The appetizer baskets include pickle-flavoured cotton candy. In the second round, they must dip into cookie jars to discover sweet ingredients for their entrees, including guest Nikki Bella.

programme.title: Chopped: Offal Surprise
programme.desc: The chefs set out to use ramen in a creative way for their appetizer. Then in the entree round, an offal surprise is a source of stress for the competitors.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Toastbusters
programme.desc: Noah Cappe hits the Hunt County Fair in Greenville, Texas, and makes short work of the Smoke Bomb and the French toast crunch burger. But it's the blue bacon cheesecake that really knocks him out.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Devil Wears Pasta
programme.desc: Noah Cappe gets things started in Florida at the Okeechobee County Fair where he samples the Hot Wing Grilled Cheese, the Sweet Bacon Devil Burger and the made-in-Florida Strawberry Margarita Funnel Cake.

programme.title: Man v. Food: St. Louis, MO
programme.desc: Casey Webb visits St. Louis, Missouri, in search of the biggest and best the city has to offer. He encounters a four-pound meatball and tackles a New York-style pizza so massive he'll need the help of a partner to take it down.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Duluth, MN
programme.desc: Casey heads to Duluth, Minnesota, where he tastes the city's best fish fry, visits a specialty sandwich shop and attempts to finish a three-pound platter of pie and ice cream in 20 minutes or less.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Green Bay, Wisconsin
programme.desc: Casey Webb's search for the best eats brings him to Green Bay, Wis. He gets into the tailgate tradition with a green-and-gold burger piled high with bratwurst, cheese curds and jalapenos.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Indianapolis, IN
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Indianapolis to battle a beast of a tenderloin sandwich. Along the way, he chows down on 38-ounces of succulent prime rib at a 100-year-old steakhouse and enjoys a tasty farm-fresh twist on macaroni and cheese.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Extra Crispy
programme.desc: We're tracking down the crunchiest, flakiest and noisiest favorite foods in New York.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Sandwich Hall Of Fame
programme.desc: We're honoring the all-time favorite sandwiches in the 'Sandwich Hall of Fame,' because it's all about the bread and what's in between! If you've never had a BL'G'T, Eddie Jackson will tell you where to go.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: United Tastes of America
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson is the guide on a mouthwatering trip to sample all the classic, iconic dishes of America. From delicious desserts on the Florida coast to spicy-hot chili in the Lone Star State, this is the best way to experience the USA.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Cheat Day
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson gears up for his favourite day of the week- cheat day! It's a full-on sugar and carb overload with everything from cakes to shakes.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Asian Sensations
programme.desc: Take your taste buds on a trip to the Far East with a list of America's best Asian dishes. Martha Stewart shares a perfect meaty powerhouse in New York City; Alex Guarnaschelli uncovers a heavy-hitting pork bun in Minneapolis, and more.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: On a Date
programme.desc: Birds are chirping, flowers are blooming, bellies are full and love is in the air. Celebrate the best meals for any romantic occasion. Alex Guarnaschelli wines and dines with the most amazing gnocchi ever made in New York City.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Desserts to Die For
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson finds the most delectable, distinctive and to-die-for dessert dishes around. They have the power to take diners back in time, back home or even to places they've never been before.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Superstuffed
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson shares a day's worth of foods that are jam-packed, crammed full and super stuffed with the tastiest, most delicious flavors imaginable.

programme.title: Southern and Hungry: Southern Comforts Are Just Around the Corner
programme.desc: Southern food gets schooled when Damaris Phillips and NASCAR personality Rutledge Wood.

programme.title: Southern and Hungry: Biloxi's Big Eats
programme.desc: In a city like Biloxi, Mississippi, it's a must to indulge in all the fresh seafood fished daily from the gulf so Damaris Philips and Rutledge Wood waste no time settling in.

programme.title: Southern and Hungry: Smokey Mountain Majesty
programme.desc: Damaris Philips and Rutledge Wood continue their tour in Knoxville, Tennessee, a city that insists on using only the freshest regional ingredients for its spectacular Southern cuisine.

programme.title: Southern and Hungry: A Whole Beast of Flavor
programme.desc: Damaris Phillips and NASCAR personality Rutledge Wood sop up the sauce in Charleston, S.C., as they discover the pleasures of whole hog barbecue with legendary pitmaster, Rodney Scott. Then they are on to one of the best burgers in America.

programme.title: Southern and Hungry: Chattanooga Chew
programme.desc: Damaris Philips and Rutledge Wood shift their food tour into high gear exploring stunning Chattanooga, Tennessee.

programme.title: Southern and Hungry: Bring It On, Birmingham!
programme.desc: Damaris Philips and Rutledge Wood are sold on Birmingham, Alabama's, Southern hospitality and amazing eats! At the charming 1950s hot dog shop Gus's Hot Dogs, the duo feasts on a spicy wiener packed with decidedly Southern flavors and spices.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Big Sky, Big Game, Big Flavor!
programme.desc: Ali's expedition for the best deals in Bozeman, Mont., begins with farm-to-table fresh benedict and summer sausage before hunting down a made-from-scratch elk burger.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Mountain Feast
programme.desc: Ali hits the Jackson Hole, Wyo., trail running for a delicious croque madame with mornay sauce in the morning and crosses the Snake River for a crunchy fried chicken banh mi sandwich.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Crossroad Foodie
programme.desc: Ali paves the way in Salt Lake City with a zesty pound cake-inspired French toast, then gets wasted on a burger topped with fried guacamole. A biker bar sends him to heaven with a Utah staple, fried Mormon funeral potatoes.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Great Lakes Craves
programme.desc: Ali Kahn digs into the best deals in Grand Rapids with a twilight French toast glistening with creamy anglaise sauce. For lunch, it's a Mexican fiesta with layers of juicy pork torta de jamon.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Minneapolis, MN
programme.desc: Ali Khan has 12 hours and only 35 bucks to find the best deals in Minneapolis for breakfast, lunch, a snack and dinner! Join him on this sweet and savory ride in his search for some of best deals on the best meals in Minneapolis!

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Cream of the Crop
programme.desc: Ali Khan starts his day in Louisville, KY., by cutting into a towering stack of thick hot chocolate pancakes. Lunchtime in Louisville means a saucy Mata Hari hot brown.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: All Aboard In Chat-Town
programme.desc: Ali Khan is looking for the best deals in Chattanooga, starting with a glorious colossal cinnamon roll before he digs into an out-of-this-world sweet and sassy lamb burger for lunch.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Culinary Cornhuskers
programme.desc: Ali Khan starts his Omaha food adventure with breakfast from a fast made-from-scratch joint offering a crazy good egg boat with hash browns. For lunch, Ali tips his hat to an iconic Omaha lunch with a housemade Reuben.

programme.title: Good Eats: What's Up Duck?
programme.desc: Alton ponders thermodynamics as he makes duck in his quest to make duck a regular dish.

programme.title: Good Eats: Fowl Territory
programme.desc: Alton shares his favourite weeknight meal, Cornish game hen, with an eye on food safety. From the grocery store to the leftovers, he shows how to shop, prep, cook, and even grill while providing guidelines and tools for proper food handling and clean up.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Surf And Turf
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is scouring the country for fiery fresh takes on the beloved classic combination, surf and turf.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Surf And Turf
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is scouring the country for fiery fresh takes on the beloved classic combination, surf and turf.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Roadside 'Cue
programme.desc: While road-tripping through Texas, Roger Mooking pulls the car over for some seriously delicious barbecue. In San Antonio, he makes a pit stop at The Box Street Social food truck to hang chickens and racks of ribs over a live fire.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Smoked Out
programme.desc: Where there's fire, there's smoke, and some of the most flavourful meat on the market.

programme.title: Demon House: The Lost Footage
programme.desc: Zak Bagans investigates a home he purchased sight unseen in Gary, Indiana, after learning about its demonic history.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Goatman's Bridge
programme.desc: The Ghost Adventures crew is in Denton, Texas, investigating Goatman's Bridge. They learn about satanic worship underneath the bridge and hear stories from four women who were physically attacked by a demonic entity.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Ogden Possession
programme.desc: Zak and the crew travel to Ogden, Utah, to help a family plagued by a demonic figure that appears as a beautiful red-headed girl.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Phelps Dodge Hospital
programme.desc: The crew investigates an abandoned Arizona hospital where the caretaker is being choked by a dark presence. A strange conflict arises between Zak and Aaron after objects are thrown at the guys and a violent threat is captured on EVP.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Spine-Chilling Southwest
programme.desc: Zak and the crew investigate extraterrestrial activity at the Stardust Ranch in Buckeye, Arizona. They then return to the Washoe Club in Virginia City, Nevada, where a highly personal communication brings the guys to tears.

programme.title: Strange World: Overlords
programme.desc: Independent filmmaker Christopher Garetano takes a close look at the ever-increasing world of automation as he investigates whether artificial intelligence will become humanity's greatest ally or its biggest biggest existential threat.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Spine-Chilling Southwest
programme.desc: Zak and the crew investigate extraterrestrial activity at the Stardust Ranch in Buckeye, Arizona. They then return to the Washoe Club in Virginia City, Nevada, where a highly personal communication brings the guys to tears.

programme.title: Snapped: Neola Robinson
programme.desc: The investigation into a missing mechanic sends Texas authorities on a wild goose chase that ceases at a dead end... until years later, when a new tip heats this cold case to a boil.

programme.title: Snapped: Tammy Cole
programme.desc: An old flame comes back to rekindle a romance and ends up charged with murder and arson.

programme.title: Snapped: Dee Dee Moore
programme.desc: A millionaire lottery winner goes missing, leaving his financial advisor in the spotlight.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Sanctuary
programme.desc: After a female jogger is brutally murdered in the park, Rixton and Atwater arrive to find two suspects fleeing the scene. When the men enter a church, the priest blocks the police from entering the building.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: I Remember Her Now
programme.desc: The body of a young girl is found crushed in an abandoned building after she runs away from a treatment centre for troubled girls. Voight sends Halstead to work undercover inside the centre, where he believes something shady is happening.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Seven Indictments
programme.desc: When a charred body is found in a torched house, Intelligence must work to identify the victim, as well as a young boy who is found badly injured inside. As they work towards identifying the victim, they uncover a web of secrets and lies.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Favor, Affection, Malice or Ill-Will
programme.desc: When Lindsay is tipped off about a grieving father looking to avenge his daughter's death, Olinsky goes undercover as a hitman-for-hire. Meanwhile, Ruzek comes back after finishing his undercover assignment, only to have Voight knock him down to patrol.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Emotional Proximity
programme.desc: Olinsky's daughter remains in critical condition following a massive fire, leaving Intelligence on edge, but more determined than ever to track down the suspect.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Remember the Devil
programme.desc: After being tipped off about a woman running barefoot through the woods, Intelligence is led to a kidnapping victim locked up in a shipping container.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: A Little Bit of Light
programme.desc: When Chicago's 'Nightcrawler' Bobby Trent is murdered over a single piece of footage, Intelligence must investigate one of Chicago's wealthiest families, uncovering a lineage of old money and secrets.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Last Minute Resistance
programme.desc: After encouraging her sister to spend a night out with friends, Burgess wakes up to find that Nicole never made it home. As the guilt begins to eat at Burgess, the team in Intelligence bands together to find Nicole.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Grasping for Salvation
programme.desc: While investigating the murder of a teenage boy, Voight finds a connection to an old case. The victim's father, a prominent defense attorney, tries to get the case taken over by Area Central Homicide.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Fagin
programme.desc: The team is called to an in-progress bank robbery and find a detective trying to take over the crime scene. As the robberies continue to be executed around the city, Lindsay is forced to make a decision in the heat of the moment.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Sanctuary
programme.desc: After a female jogger is brutally murdered in the park, Rixton and Atwater arrive to find two suspects fleeing the scene. When the men enter a church, the priest blocks the police from entering the building.

programme.title: Movie: Alex Cross
programme.desc: A homicide detective is tested when a skilled serial killer inflicts pain and torture on his victims.

programme.title: Movie: I Can Do Bad All by Myself
programme.desc: A singer with a drinking problem becomes the unwilling parent to three troubled teens who have nowhere else to turn. Though she seems to want nothing to do with them, new circumstances inspire her to change her situation.

programme.title: Martin: I've Got a Secret
programme.desc: Pam, Tommy and Cole are angry at Martin and Gina when Martin reveals Pam's secret on his show. Martin and Gina's only friends left are Martin's boss Stan and Stan's girlfriend.

programme.title: Martin: Do the Fight Thing
programme.desc: Martin's radio fans love it when Gina and Martin have arguments on the show and Stan wants to permanently hire Gina as Martin's co- host.

programme.title: Martin: I Saw Gina Kissing Santa Claus
programme.desc: Martin reluctantly agrees to dress up as Santa Claus for Tommy's 'Big Brother' program.

programme.title: Martin: Break Up (Part One)
programme.desc: Martin and Gina break up after an argument over a Valentine's Day gift.

programme.title: Martin: Break Up (Part Two)
programme.desc: After the breakup with Gina, Cole and Tommy take Martin out to meet new women.

programme.title: Martin: Break Up (Part Three)
programme.desc: Realizing he made a mistake, Martin tries to win Gina back.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Be My Baby Tonight
programme.desc: Ashley can't get her folks to understand the sexual attraction she has for her boyfriend.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Striptease for Two
programme.desc: Will and Carleton perform as male strippers in order to recover pawned jewellery.

programme.title: The Jamie Foxx Show: Musical Chairs
programme.desc: Jamie sings with Nicole at a nightclub, which rekindles his interests in a career in music, despite Fancy's misgivings. Jamie later agrees to perform with Nicole again after they are asked back for another gig.

programme.title: The Jamie Foxx Show: Road Trip
programme.desc: Nicole kisses Jamie on the stage before they perform a gig in Las Vegas, a trip Fancy refused to join them on. Fancy then makes a surprise visit to Jamie's hotel room only to find that he is sharing it with Nicole.

programme.title: The Jamie Foxx Show: I Second That Demo-Tion
programme.desc: Jamie and Nicole risk their jobs by working on their demo tape in the Jingles 2000 studio after hours, against company policy and they meet the night janitor who claims he is related to Montell Jordan.

programme.title: The Jamie Foxx Show: Road Trip
programme.desc: To win Fancy back, Jamie buys her an engagement ring, only to get an offer from Nicole to sing with her on tour in Europe.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: How I Spent My Summer Vacation
programme.desc: When Will refuses to dress in a more conservative manner, Philip asks him to move out.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Will Gets Committed

programme.title: Martin: Credit Card Blues
programme.desc: Martin and a friend find themselves in big trouble after committing credit card fraud.

programme.title: Martin: Jerome's in the House

programme.title: Martin: Your Arms Are Too Short to Box With Martin
programme.desc: Martin and Cole try to avenge a beating given to Tommy by Shannon's ex and his friends.

programme.title: Martin: Baby You Can Drive My Car
programme.desc: The gang all chip in for a raffle ticket and they win a brand new SUV.

programme.title: Martin: Variety Show
programme.desc: Martin is chosen to produce a charity show, but lets the power go to his head.

programme.title: Meet the Browns: Meet the Wills
programme.desc: When tests reveal a lump in Sasha's breast Will overreacts and plays doctor.

programme.title: Meet the Browns: Meet the Bully
programme.desc: A troubled boy brings a gun to Cora's class after repeated bullying. London tries to sabotage her community service so she can stay at Brown Meadows.

programme.title: Black-ish: Son of a Pitch

programme.title: Black-ish: justakidfromcompton
programme.desc: Dre and Bow want to send Kyra to Valley Glen Prep, but after the school treats them like a charity case, they are infuriated. Meanwhile, Junior wants to get a job as Josh's assistant at Stevens and Lido.

programme.title: Meet the Browns: Meet the Two Left Feet
programme.desc: Will takes secret salsa dancing lessons so he can take Sasha to a party, but Sasha thinks he's cheating on her. The Colonel and Edna decide to move out of Brown Meadows and move in together.

programme.title: Meet the Browns: Meet the Lessons
programme.desc: The family finds out that Brianna is taking birth control pills and problems arise. Meanwhile Cora is attracted to the new principal, her old high school friend, and decides to spend some time with him.

programme.title: Meet the Browns: Meet the Disorderly
programme.desc: Brianna and her friend Simone decide to sneak out and crash a frat party. Meanwhile Brown decides to fire Jesus to save money.

programme.title: Meet the Browns: Meet the Mom
programme.desc: Will gets sick and his mother, Vera, shows up. Problems arise between Sasha and Vera on the best remedy method for Will's recovery. Meanwhile, Daisy comes up missing, and Brown, Cora, Edna and the Colonel realize her mental condition is deteriorating.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Stolen Innocence
programme.desc: A father goes on the run after he rapes his 12 year-old stepdaughter for five years before she comes forward and shares the truth. Two coworkers and roommates become close and greed drives one to allegedly murder the other.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Brew
programme.desc: When the head of the Coors Brewing Company is kidnapped and held for ransom, it kicked off one of the most intense manhunts in American history. See how forensic science helped track down the kidnappers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Message in a Bottle
programme.desc: When an attractive young Missouri woman is found dead in her apartment, police meticulously generate a suspect list a mile long. The culprit turns out to be the most unlikely suspect with an insatiable lust for power and control.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Safe Place
programme.desc: A wealthy man is gunned down outside his Louisiana home. His wife tells a tale of three masked men emerging from the shadows, but she may know more than she's saying.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Live Wire
programme.desc: A thin piece of wire and some cryptic numbers on a sales receipt held the key to a brutal and senseless murder.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Murderous Moms
programme.desc: A front yard brawl between two Euclid, Ohio families leaves one person dead and investigators wondering how teenage heartbreak started it all.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Prints Among Thieves
programme.desc: An eccentric millionaire who flaunted his wealth is found murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unholy Alliance
programme.desc: Police fear a missing woman is the latest victim in a string of similar crimes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Quite a Spectacle
programme.desc: In possibly the strangest case in the history of forensic science, investigators must solve a murder case with a list of evidence consisting entirely of a single squashed tomato left at the crime scene, and tiny reflections of light in a photograph.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Transaction Failed
programme.desc: When a dedicated, well-respected teacher disappeared, police had to determine if she'd gone on vacation without telling anyone, or if she was the victim of foul play. Investigators turned to forensic science, hoping to find the answers they needed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Good as Gold
programme.desc: Two young women are killed by a mysterious intruder. Investigators hope that his unusual brand of cigarettes and new advances in DNA technology can paint a picture of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shattered Innocence
programme.desc: When a prominent criminal defence attorney is found murdered in his own home, police suspect it may have come at the hands of one of his questionable clientele.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Impression
programme.desc: For sixteen years, a woman's death was considered an accident. Until someone called the authorities suggesting it was murder-- and turned up dead themselves.

programme.title: Forensic Files: As the Tide Turns
programme.desc: A woman is found dead. A man's version of events was at variance with the evidence, so investigators turned to forensic science, hoping to determine if this was a botched robbery, or cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Brew
programme.desc: When the head of the Coors Brewing Company is kidnapped and held for ransom, it kicked off one of the most intense manhunts in American history. See how forensic science helped track down the kidnappers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Message in a Bottle
programme.desc: When an attractive young Missouri woman is found dead in her apartment, police meticulously generate a suspect list a mile long. The culprit turns out to be the most unlikely suspect with an insatiable lust for power and control.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Safe Place
programme.desc: A wealthy man is gunned down outside his Louisiana home. His wife tells a tale of three masked men emerging from the shadows, but she may know more than she's saying.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Live Wire
programme.desc: A thin piece of wire and some cryptic numbers on a sales receipt held the key to a brutal and senseless murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Concrete Alibi
programme.desc: An aspiring model turns up dead and the suspect is obvious. But when things don't turn out quite the way police planned, they have to dig a little deeper. Leaving no stone unturned, a forensic geologist points police to some unlikely suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Key Evidence
programme.desc: An Illinois community is outraged when an off-duty police officer is shot and killed. Police are able to key in on a suspect and with the help of a gunshot residue expert and trace evidence expert make sure their killer pays for his crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Prints Among Thieves
programme.desc: An eccentric millionaire who flaunted his wealth is found murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unholy Alliance
programme.desc: Police fear a missing woman is the latest victim in a string of similar crimes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Marked for Life
programme.desc: In 1957 the police search for a man who committed several crimes in one night, including murder. Eventually, the case turned cold. Almost fifty years later, with the help of scientific advances, the investigators find their man.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Puzzle
programme.desc: When a bicycle rider is struck and fatally injured in a hit-and-run accident, forensic investigators utilize an assortment of miniscule clues to determine the identity of the offending vehicle and eventually the person who was driving it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fired Up
programme.desc: When a woman's charred remains are found in the rubble of a burned house, investigators have to determine if it is an unfortunate accident, or arson and murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Two in a Million
programme.desc: A millionaire and his family are executed in their own home. For three years the murders went unsolved, until a 30-year-old box of bullets and some iridescent fibers revealed the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Danger
programme.desc: A young man dies in a mysterious car crash, but was it an accident? Forensic science uncovered what really caused the crash, and the truth devastated three different families.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Internal Affair
programme.desc: Friends and family of a woman gone missing were determined to find her until their worst fears were confirmed weeks later. Blood evidence and computer forensics helped investigators to catch the killer, and convince the jury of his guilt.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dockter Visit
programme.desc: The investigation into the murder of a World War II veteran is impeded when detectives' prime suspect provides a solid alibi, but forensic scientists are able to make a key discovery due to the killer's preference for a distinctive style of footwear.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A woman suffering from depression apparently took her own life. But her sister told police, that a year before her death, she said if anything were to happen to her, there was a note in the china cabinet. Investigators found the note and the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Moss Not Grass
programme.desc: A young woman is found dead on a golf course in the Bahamas, and the evidence leads police to two suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Material Witness
programme.desc: A teenager goes missing after an evening of horseback riding, and her body is found a month later, three miles from her home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sole Survivor

programme.title: Forensic Files: All 'Butt' Certain
programme.desc: A woman is convinced her husband is innocent of murder and conducted her own investigation to prove it.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Fire and Ice
programme.desc: On target for an $8.4-million-dollar season, Parker's wash plant catches fire. Rick finishes his first season strong. Tony heads into the wilderness to find lost equipment to get his ancient dredge running. Followed by a special aftershow of 'The Dirt.'

programme.title: Gold Rush: Back to the Future
programme.desc: An extended sneak peek of the all-new season of Gold Rush reveals a crisis in the Klondike forcing the miners in new directions. We go back to the beginning, nine years ago, revealing the pivotal moments that got each man to the crossroads they now face.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Unleash the Beast
programme.desc: Shawn's rival Ken unleashes his 600-ton gold gobbler while Shawn fights to keep a family dynasty. Vernon makes a valiant return in an attempt to strike it rich with a new dredge. Emily fights to reclaims her hotspot.

programme.title: Undercover Billionaire: Final Reckoning
programme.desc: Glenn's 90 days are up and it's time to find out if his business is worth a million dollars. But first, Glenn reveals his true identity to his team as well as what each one of them has earned for their part of Underdog BBQ.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Secret Backwoods Recipes
programme.desc: Only a handful of moonshine recipes are considered among the best, but the path to perfection is always paved with spills.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Unleash the Beast
programme.desc: Shawn's rival Ken unleashes his 600-ton gold gobbler while Shawn fights to keep a family dynasty. Vernon makes a valiant return in an attempt to strike it rich with a new dredge. Emily fights to reclaims her hotspot.
