programme.title: Moonshiners: Moonshiners: The Legend of Jim Tom
programme.desc: The name Jim Tom is synonymous with moonshine. Between run-ins with the law and serving hard labour, he spent 60 years making illegal shine.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Back to the Future
programme.desc: An extended sneak peek of the all-new season of Gold Rush reveals a crisis in the Klondike forcing the miners in new directions. We go back to the beginning, nine years ago, revealing the pivotal moments that got each man to the crossroads they now face.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Winter's Fury
programme.desc: Marty, Matt and Misty Raney help the Russell family struggling on a failing homestead in the forests of Pennsylvania. During the biggest storm of the century, the family faces a food shortage with no hunting skills and a cabin on the brink of collapse.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Nevada Thirst
programme.desc: In the Nevada desert, the Kondors' homestead has turned to dust. The Raneys discover rattler infested trailers, searing heat and sand storms, but when Marty finds the Kondors have no water, he gambles all to save the dying homestead.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Trust or Die
programme.desc: The Deeters are dog-mushers with a homestead on the edge of disaster. Bears dine on the dog food and the forest around them is a deadly tinder box. The Raneys must push them to make drastic changes, but discover the Deeters don't trust outsiders.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Wolves at the Door
programme.desc: Poisoned well water and a mystery predator plague an Arizona homestead. After the family dog is killed, the Raney's must act quick to stop the couple from becoming the next victims.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Life or Death in Michigan
programme.desc: The old well Marty's come to fix has already claimed a victim. To set the Dagues on a path to self-sufficiency, the Raneys try to deliver a long-term water source, protein supply, and sustainable power.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Viking Sunstone
programme.desc: Josh heads to the U.K. and Norway to unlock the secrets of the Viking Sunstone, a mystic crystal the Vikings used to conquer the sea. Before testing it, he explores a crypt in a Nordic church and descends 1,000 feet into a deserted mine.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Lost Mexican City
programme.desc: Josh Gates searches Mexico for clues behind the mysterious rise and disappearance of Teotihuacan, a powerful civilization that predated the Aztecs in Mesoamerica.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Atlantis of the Andes
programme.desc: Josh dives into a mystery below South America's Lake Titicaca. During the investigation, Josh discovers multiple structures of the ancient Tiwanaku people including ruins hidden in the lake's depths, dubbed 'the Atlantis of the Andes.'

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Incan King's Mummy
programme.desc: Josh Gates ventures into the mysterious cloud forests of Ecuador's remote central highlands in search of the all-powerful mummy of the last Inca king, Atahualpa.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Search for Florida's Lost Pirate
programme.desc: Josh Gates sets sail for Florida chasing the long-lost treasure of bloodthirsty pirate Jose Gaspar. Josh joins marine archaeologists and treasure hunters working to crack the mysteries of the pirate's life so they can find the riches he left behind.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Ark of the Covenant
programme.desc: Josh follows in the footsteps of Indiana Jones as he searches in Israel and Ethiopia for the lost Ark of the Covenant, the sacred relic said to contain the Ten Commandments and possess extraordinary powers.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: True Cross of Christ
programme.desc: Josh journeys to Jerusalem and Istanbul to pursue the True Cross of Christ.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Mysteries of Jesus
programme.desc: Josh journeys to the Holy Land to investigate a mystery of biblical proportions: where Jesus Christ was born. The investigation leads to potentially explosive revelations that may change our understanding of Jesus' origin story.

programme.title: The Little Couple: We Part-Tay!
programme.desc: Bill and Jen take the kids to Holi Fest, a Hindu celebration of spring. Everyone douses each other with multicoloured paint powder and water guns. The family then heads to Pop-Pop's house where they enjoy a wild test drive of Bill Sr.'s boat.

programme.title: The Little Couple: The 'Scare' Boat
programme.desc: Hoping to find a new activity for the kids, Jen and Bill take Will and Zoey sailing. Will masters steering the boat, but Zoey's first sailing excursion may well be her last. Then, Will throws his friends a sleep-under and things get a little crazy.

programme.title: The Little Couple: Namaste
programme.desc: Zoey's Bollywood dance recital is right around the corner, but an unexpected injury may stop her from being able to perform. Then, Bill and Jen celebrate their 11-year anniversary, and to make it special, Bill has a few surprises!

programme.title: The Little Couple: Big Updates: It's Definitely Gator Water
programme.desc: Bill surprises the family with a fun, activity-packed camping trip. Although Jen convinces Bill to rent a camper, she worries about the dangers lurking in the Florida wilderness, from alligators to poisonous plants and everything in between!

programme.title: The Little Couple: This Is How We Party
programme.desc: Zoey's dream comes true as she and her best friend have a special mermaid encounter. Then, Bill and Jen throw a big summer party for all her friends but have to scramble when an unexpected Florida rainstorm threatens to ruin their big event.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: There's No Place Like Home
programme.desc: A trip to the Busbys' old home brings a surprise. Adam's job situation faces a new development. Meanwhile, the Busbys brace for bad news at Hazel's eye appointment and Danielle and the Quants come up with a creative way to give back to the NICU.

programme.title: OutDaughtered: Quintessential Questions
programme.desc: The Busbsys answer viewers' burning questions about their crazy lives raising quints. Through interviews and never before seen footage, Adam, Danielle and the girls give insight on all those things people have wanted to know and were not afraid to ask.

programme.title: The First 48: Night Run
programme.desc: When a young father is ambushed by a pack of brazen shooters, Atlanta Detective Summer Benton uncovers the shocking reason for his murder.

programme.title: The First 48: Blood Alley/ Bad Deal
programme.desc: An unidentified man is found dead in an alley, the victim of a hit and run. A 24-year-old man is shot to death in his apartment during a drug deal.

programme.title: The First 48: Jacked/ Fallen Idol
programme.desc: In Dallas, a young father is ambushed at a gas station, and Det. Steve David needs to track him down. Then in Miami, a beloved local rapper is gunned down at his car wash, and detectives suspect it was an inside job.

programme.title: The First 48: Million Dollar Question
programme.desc: In Cleveland, a man is found in a dark alley, shot multiple times and left for dead. Detectives Ray Diaz and Kathy Cruz put their lives on the line to untangle a web of lies and bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Stuffed Turkey
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr act as not-so-handy-men assembling furniture. Thanksgiving comes early for tonight's loser when he must talk turkey at a dating event.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crickets
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q and Joe head to Joey Fatone's hot dog joint to dish up weenies, and tonight's big loser performs a stand-up comedy routine but barely gets out alive.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Q-Pay
programme.desc: The guys kill time in a waiting room by sharing some TMI texts with strangers, then try to sabotage each other as the wingmen from hell at a dating event. Tonight's big loser gets a very special donation from one of the other Jokers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr cruise the food court sending texts to strangers, then throw caution, and groceries, to the wind. And tonight's loser is cast as a genie in a play but wishes he could be anywhere else.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Flatfoot the Pirate
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr explain why they've been doused with water at the mall, and tonight's big loser plays a pirate but won't find any rum in his cup.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Remember the Pact
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q beg shoppers to hold on to a weird item, then teach tech to seniors. Tonight's loser reveals his embarrassing digital life to his dad.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Silence of the Lame
programme.desc: It's all play and no work when the guys square off in a toy-pitching competition. And tonight's big loser has to quiet down patrons in a food court.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Walking Dread
programme.desc: The guys take time to smell the roses, then pair up to double dip at the mall. Tonight's loser battles an undead enemy to save his family.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Night Out
programme.desc: Adam and Emily prepare for a big night out by revealing the marketing ploy that led to women shaving and the fashion agendas that created pockets. Then, the two friends pour back the truth on alcohol consumption.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Little Bugs
programme.desc: Adam uncovers the benefits of spiders, serves up knowledge on why we should be eating more bugs as a protein source, and illustrates the benefits of little bugs on your gut health.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Cops
programme.desc: Adam looks at the truth behind the overuse of SWAT Teams, illustrates how using school officers can create a pipeline for prisons, and examines the origins and intended purpose of police officers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Medium, Well Done
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q, and Joe pose as TV execs pitching insane shows, and tonight's big loser undergoes a psychic reading that puts his real life on the wrong track.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Drum and Drummer
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Q and Joe convince shoppers to repeat odd catch phrases, then go mental as psychoanalysts. Plus, tonight's losers perform at a halftime show.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Nature
programme.desc: Adam digs up the dirt on nature, revealing that Mount Everest is a frozen pile of poop, natural disasters are actually man-made, and there is no such thing as untouched wilderness.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins the Wild West
programme.desc: Adam illustrates how, despite its macho man reputation, prostitutes actually helped settle the West. He then goes on to explain why the 'All-American Cowboy' is a myth, and that the real hero of the west wasn't a person at all - it was air conditioning.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Justice
programme.desc: After getting Emily out of prison, Adam and his sister Rhea take on the justice system, shining a spotlight on the infamous McDonalds hot coffee lawsuit, and the substantial problems with the jury duty system.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Weight Loss
programme.desc: Adam illustrates all the reasons low-fat diets can actually make you fatter, and why counting calories is a waste of time.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins College
programme.desc: Adam shares why becoming a dropout billionaire is unlikely and how school rankings have little to do with education quality. Plus, student loans.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Cops
programme.desc: Adam looks at the truth behind the overuse of SWAT Teams, illustrates how using school officers can create a pipeline for prisons, and examines the origins and intended purpose of police officers.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Drugs
programme.desc: Adam weeds through the myths of marijuana, exposes the blunt truth about the War on Drugs, and explains how prescription pills are the true gateway drug.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Housing
programme.desc: While looking for a new home, Adam exposes the harsh realities of real estate. Plus, he explains why helping the homeless is a lot simpler than you think.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Immigration
programme.desc: Adam illustrates the big problem a border wall wouldn't address, explores the history of racist deportations, and explains how immigration courts are a huge mess.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Crossing the Line
programme.desc: Officer Kevin Bronson races to get a driver under the influence off the road. Officer Eric Hannett catches two teenagers joyriding an ATV on a public road. Up north, Officer Bob Mancini helps evacuate an injured hiker.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Uncuffed: Spring Fever
programme.desc: The action heats up as the weather does and the wardens are out policing park visitors who are getting into all sorts of mischief. If that's not enough they'll also need to wrangle a poisonous snake who's already bitten one victim.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Protect and Preserve: On the Loose

programme.title: North Woods Law: Too Close for Comfort
programme.desc: Officers Arsenault confronts a hunter accused of hunting too close to a school and damaging property.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Too Close for Comfort
programme.desc: Officers Arsenault confronts a hunter accused of hunting too close to a school and damaging property.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Mud Season
programme.desc: The wardens investigate several accidents caused by the mud, including rescuing a boy who was caught in a flash flood. Also, Parker investigates an ATV hit-and-run.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Summer Heats Up
programme.desc: Summer has arrived and people are filling up the woods and causing trouble. MacCabe finds a campsite where the occupants seem to have vanished, and the wardens search for a pot grow op after a drug deal went wrong.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Casper: The White Crocodile
programme.desc: Steve and his team relocate 11 of the feistiest crocodiles to their new pond at the zoo.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Kittens in Wonderland
programme.desc: Tabby kittens and a bearded dragon, a group of Burmese kittens go on an adventure and the runt of a litter of Siberian kittens plays with a miniature horse.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Fluffy's Last Stand
programme.desc: A mother and daughter are being torn apart by their cat, Missy, who's determined to kill their other cat Fluffy. Jackson meets a tortie named Candy, who's beating up a nine-year-old because she isn't so sweet.

programme.title: Dr. Dee: Alaska Vet: Against All Odds
programme.desc: Dr. Terry operates on a dog that was viciously attacked; Dr. Dee helps a lovesick turtle and performs a pregnancy check for a rancher.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: A Brave Little Dog
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff treats a dog with a mysterious injury. Dr. Petra helps vet tech Jess' Dalmatian after it eats something toxic. A neglected turtle needs a new home, and the team falls in love with a litter of stray kittens.

programme.title: The Zoo: Kangaroo Dave
programme.desc: Dave, a kangaroo suffering from chronic arthritis, tries cryotherapy. A large group of rambunctious gharials are trained to patiently wait for their food. And, a tiny pygmy marmoset gives birth to an even tinier baby.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Save the Elephants
programme.desc: An elephant family has a potentially deadly virus affecting animals in captivity and in the wild. With the youngest members of the family most at risk, the keepers and the zoo's veterinary team must do all they can to combat the mysterious illness.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Pressure Cooker
programme.desc: Villalobos faces one of their most challenging rescues when a house fire reveals a massive dog-hoarding situation. Two teachers fall in love with a deaf puppy they hope to give a forever home.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Fire Dog
programme.desc: A potential best friend needs to pass a unique test before he can be adopted out. Parolee Jammall returns after a mysterious absence. A year after losing their house in a fire, M2 and Kanani do something special for the dog who saved their lives.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Invisible Assassin
programme.desc: Diver Tim Saxon is filming underwater at the Great Barrier Reef when an Irukandji jellyfish, one of the world's most venomous animals, stings him. Forester George Knoll is working in the remote Great Bear Rainforest when a grizzly bear attacks.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Grisly Encounters
programme.desc: Jordan Carbery is investigating a noise outside his cabin and encounters a massive grizzly bear. Days before their destination-wedding celebration, Zanele Fox and her husband take a river tour when she is thrown from her raft and ravaged by a crocodile.

programme.title: Movie: I Can Do Bad All by Myself
programme.desc: A singer with a drinking problem becomes the unwilling parent to three troubled teens who have nowhere else to turn. Though she seems to want nothing to do with them, new circumstances inspire her to change her situation.

programme.title: Movie: Coach Carter
programme.desc: A high school basketball coach transforms his team into champions, but then prevents them from playing until they improve their grades.

programme.title: Movie: Meet the Browns

programme.title: Martin: Checks, Lies and Videotape

programme.title: Counting Cars: Size Matters
programme.desc: Danny's friend Brian has always wanted to ride a motorcycle, but has never been able due to his physical limitations. Will Danny and the guys be able to get Brian in the wind for the first time?

programme.title: Counting Cars: Soap Box
programme.desc: Danny and Horny Mike get too close for comfort when they convince a Model-T Hot Rod owner to let them take it for a spin. Later, a Soap Box race car brings out the inner child in Roli and Mike.

programme.title: Counting Cars: The Horn Ultimatum
programme.desc: Danny discovers the rarest Cadillac collection he's ever seen. Later, Horny Mike has 30 days to move his big ugly bus from the shop's parking lot before Danny has it sent to the dump.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Haunted Hog
programme.desc: Danny has no interest in a rubber-to-roof restoration on a '73 Chevy Blazer until he hears that it's a tribute to the owner's nephew. Later, a haunted hotel owner wants a creepy bike.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Count's Cryptonite
programme.desc: Emotions run deep when Danny receives an astronomical offer for one of his prized cars. Kevin helps spot an epic flip that brings in a ton of cash, and the guys visit SEMA, the world's biggest and most extravagant auto show.

programme.title: Counting Cars: One Love, One Car
programme.desc: Ziggy Marley commissions a restoration of his father, Bob Marley's, vintage Mercedes.

programme.title: Counting Cars: The Marleymobile
programme.desc: It's all hands on deck as the shop rushes to finish restoring the last car Bob Marley ever owned.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Mustang Memories
programme.desc: Danny is commissioned to restore a family heirloom '67 Ford Mustang. He wants to make it a world-class, one-of-a-kind street machine, so he visits the home of the baddest Mustangs on Earth for inspiration: the Shelby Heritage Center in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Willys for Warriors
programme.desc: Danny checks out a collection that includes a 1933 Ford Roadster and a '53 Henry J. Meanwhile Kevin, Ryan and Mike make an unauthorised purchase and the pressure is on Ryan to show it's worthwhile.

programme.title: Counting Cars: It Hurst So Good
programme.desc: The Plymouth Road Runner has always eluded Danny, but when he finally finds one and buys it, it becomes a nightmare for Kevin. When Kevin tries to shut down the project, Danny pulls a fast one.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Who's Your Caddy?
programme.desc: Danny acquires a '62 Caddy which he hopes will be a huge flip. Ryan devises a secret plan for the car behind Danny's back, but when Danny finds out, there's some explaining to do. A snafu threatens to turn the Caddy into a money pit.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Chrome Is Where the Heart Is
programme.desc: Danny tries to get the derailed '62 Caddy project back on track, while Ryan tries to make amends for a mishap by finding a flip or two for the shop.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Sailor's Soul
programme.desc: Representatives from Sailor Jerry enlist the shop's help to build a bike to commemorate the late artist's iconic style and to auction off at an upcoming charity fundraiser.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Tricked Out Triumph
programme.desc: Danny and the team are commissioned to restore a 1941 Triumph motorcycle back to its World War II-era glory. Even with a $50,000 budget, the project turns into one of the biggest challenges in Count's Kustoms history.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Tricked Out Triumph
programme.desc: The crew continues to piece together a WWII era Triumph motorcycle for a client hoping to have it as a tribute to his family's military roots.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Crazy Cool Cadillac
programme.desc: Ryan reluctantly goes down the Caddy customization wormhole on a personal project, and everyone at the shop is happy to watch him go, just to see how great it turns out.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Red, Hot and Dangerous
programme.desc: Danny has big plans for a little street rocket known as a Manta and the crew commissions an 80s era Corvette that the owner wants to bring into the new millennium. Shannon meets a lady motorcycle racer who wants her Harley XR1200 customized.

programme.title: Movie: The Split
programme.desc: A gang robs the ticket booth at the Los Angeles Coliseum. After the caper, the gang leader hides the money at his ex-wife's place, but her landlord steals the cash. The gang then suspects they were double-crossed by one of their own.

programme.desc: A physician helps a woman with sickle-cell anemia while she is being pursued.

programme.desc: George becomes Steinbrenner's pet when he shares a calzone with him. Jerry takes advantage of his girlfriend's ability to get anything she wants. Kramer uses an oven to dry his clothes.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Wait Out
programme.desc: Jerry and Elaine are interested in dating a couple who recently ended their relationship.

programme.title: New Girl: Katie
programme.desc: Jess inadvertently captures the attention of a beer delivery guy and then pretends to be someone else when a handsome stranger thinks she is his blind date. Nick meets his 'future' self and Winston's mother comes to visit.

programme.title: New Girl: Fluffer
programme.desc: Nick and Jess address their relationship-without-benefits. Meanwhile, Winston has a lot on his mind besides Shelby. Then, hoping to date a beautiful Republican, Schmidt pretends to be one of presidential candidate Mitt Romney's sons.

programme.title: New Girl: Neighbors
programme.desc: A group of twenty-something neighbours move in across the hall and Jess and Schmidt are determined to befriend them. Meanwhile, Nick enacts a series of pranks on Schmidt to make him think he's getting older.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Planes, Fingers and Automobiles
programme.desc: When Max decides to head to Los Angeles to win back Randy, she and Caroline embark on a cross-country road trip with Han at the wheel. Also, while Han and the girls are away, Oleg takes charge of the diner and Sophie fills in as a waitress.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Riverboat Runs Through It
programme.desc: As Max and Caroline's road trip misadventures continue, their lack of money finds them stowing away and waitressing on a riverboat in New Orleans as Max tries to reach Randy in Texas. Back at the diner, Oleg and Sophie rake in big bucks on pony rides.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Stalking Dead
programme.desc: Max and Caroline get their big break when they're cast as zombie extras after they finally arrive at the movie set where Randy is working. Back at home, Han and Oleg try their hand at construction after firing the contractor working on the dessert bar.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Emergency Contractor
programme.desc: When Max and Caroline get home from their road trip, Caroline discovers she likes the dessert bar renovations as much as she like Bobby, the contractor on the job. Also, Max rushes to Randy’s side when she hears he's in the hospital in New York City.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond: Traffic School
programme.desc: Robert's traffic school students complain that his classes cause severe insomnia.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond: Six Feet Under
programme.desc: Debra tries to teach Raymond how to have a 'normal' mid-life crisis like everyone else.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond: The Garage Sale
programme.desc: Ray gets upset when Debra gives away all the 'baby stuff' at a family garage sale.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Horizontal Hold
programme.desc: Carrie and Doug ban sex for two weeks, forcing them to resolve their conflicts verbally.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Package Deal
programme.desc: Doug quits his job to work for a competitor and Carrie develops a tanning cream addiction.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Separation Anxiety
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie have different opinions about Deacon and Kelly's recent separation.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Inner Tube
programme.desc: Doug's guilty conscience leads to a spoof in which he appears on a number of TV shows.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Invitations
programme.desc: Jerry thinks he has met his perfect match and proposes marriage. George's selection of cheap wedding invitations inadvertently provides him with a way to escape his upcoming nuptials.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Foundation
programme.desc: Jerry's quote from Star Trek inspires Susan's parents to create a foundation in her memory. Kramer becomes a karate master, but his opponents are all kids. Mr. Peterman leaves Elaine in charge.

programme.title: Friends: The One With George Stephanopoulos
programme.desc: When a pizza guy accidentally delivers a pizza meant for George Stephanopoulos, who lives across the street to the female friends, the women decide to peek at the towel-clad former White House advisor with their binoculars.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Candy Hearts
programme.desc: Chandler is set up with Janice and ends up sleeping with her; the girls meet firemen.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Fake Monica
programme.desc: Monica's credit card is stolen, and along with Phoebe and Rachel, she decides to catch the person who stole it. The thief turns out to be so charming and inspiring that Monica decides to become friends with her instead of turning her over to the police.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Breast Milk
programme.desc: Ross looks after his newborn son and freaks when somebody drinks the breast milk.

programme.title: Friends: The One After the Super Bowl

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Eddie Won't Go

programme.title: Friends: The One With All the Wedding Dresses
programme.desc: Monica and Phoebe have fun trying on wedding dresses after they pick up Emily's gown.

programme.title: Friends: The One on the Last Night
programme.desc: As Monica helps Rachel move in with Phoebe, they recall their time together as roommates.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Nap Partners
programme.desc: Monica orders Chandler to apologize to an old girlfriend he dumped because of her weight.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Cheap Wedding Dress
programme.desc: Monica has to fight a fellow bride-to-be for a unique wedding dress.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Ross's Grant
programme.desc: Ross must apply to a Nobel prize winning scientist for a palaeontology grant.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where the Stripper Cries
programme.desc: Monica and Rachel hire an ungainly stripper to perform for Phoebe's bachelorette party.

programme.title: American Dad!: Lincoln Lover
programme.desc: Stan has his heart set on speaking at the Republican National Convention, but is passed up for another candidate. Not one to admit defeat, he accepts an endorsement from the local gay chapter of Republicans.

programme.title: American Dad!: Dungeons and Wagons

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Thank God for Scoliosis
programme.desc: Charlie and Jake fight for the affections of a waitress, while Alan fights the sexual tension between him and his receptionist.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: I Think You Offended Don

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: David Copperfield Slipped Me a Roofie

programme.title: Undercover Billionaire: Final Reckoning
programme.desc: Glenn's 90 days are up and it's time to find out if his business is worth a million dollars. But first, Glenn reveals his true identity to his team as well as what each one of them has earned for their part of Underdog BBQ.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Secret Backwoods Recipes
programme.desc: Only a handful of moonshine recipes are considered among the best, but the path to perfection is always paved with spills.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Unleash the Beast
programme.desc: Shawn's rival Ken unleashes his 600-ton gold gobbler while Shawn fights to keep a family dynasty. Vernon makes a valiant return in an attempt to strike it rich with a new dredge. Emily fights to reclaims her hotspot.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Moonshiners: The Legend of Jim Tom

programme.title: Gold Rush: Back to the Future

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Winter's Fury
programme.desc: Marty, Matt and Misty Raney help the Russell family struggling on a failing homestead in the forests of Pennsylvania. During the biggest storm of the century, the family faces a food shortage with no hunting skills and a cabin on the brink of collapse.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Nevada Thirst
programme.desc: In the Nevada desert, the Kondors' homestead has turned to dust. The Raneys discover rattler infested trailers, searing heat and sand storms, but when Marty finds the Kondors have no water, he gambles all to save the dying homestead.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Trust or Die
programme.desc: The Deeters are dog-mushers with a homestead on the edge of disaster. Bears dine on the dog food and the forest around them is a deadly tinder box. The Raneys must push them to make drastic changes, but discover the Deeters don't trust outsiders.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Wolves at the Door
programme.desc: Poisoned well water and a mystery predator plague an Arizona homestead. After the family dog is killed, the Raney's must act quick to stop the couple from becoming the next victims.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Life or Death in Michigan
programme.desc: The old well Marty's come to fix has already claimed a victim. To set the Dagues on a path to self-sufficiency, the Raneys try to deliver a long-term water source, protein supply, and sustainable power.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Viking Sunstone
programme.desc: Josh heads to the U.K. and Norway to unlock the secrets of the Viking Sunstone, a mystic crystal the Vikings used to conquer the sea. Before testing it, he explores a crypt in a Nordic church and descends 1,000 feet into a deserted mine.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Lost Mexican City
programme.desc: Josh Gates searches Mexico for clues behind the mysterious rise and disappearance of Teotihuacan, a powerful civilization that predated the Aztecs in Mesoamerica.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Atlantis of the Andes
programme.desc: Josh dives into a mystery below South America's Lake Titicaca. During the investigation, Josh discovers multiple structures of the ancient Tiwanaku people including ruins hidden in the lake's depths, dubbed 'the Atlantis of the Andes.'

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Incan King's Mummy
programme.desc: Josh Gates ventures into the mysterious cloud forests of Ecuador's remote central highlands in search of the all-powerful mummy of the last Inca king, Atahualpa.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Search for Florida's Lost Pirate
programme.desc: Josh Gates sets sail for Florida chasing the long-lost treasure of bloodthirsty pirate Jose Gaspar. Josh joins marine archaeologists and treasure hunters working to crack the mysteries of the pirate's life so they can find the riches he left behind.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Ark of the Covenant
programme.desc: Josh follows in the footsteps of Indiana Jones as he searches in Israel and Ethiopia for the lost Ark of the Covenant, the sacred relic said to contain the Ten Commandments and possess extraordinary powers.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: True Cross of Christ
programme.desc: Josh journeys to Jerusalem and Istanbul to pursue the True Cross of Christ.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Mysteries of Jesus
programme.desc: Josh journeys to the Holy Land to investigate a mystery of biblical proportions: where Jesus Christ was born. The investigation leads to potentially explosive revelations that may change our understanding of Jesus' origin story.

programme.desc: The guys have an awkward encounter with the 'King of the Gypsies', who has an incredible underground stash but insists he can't be bought.

programme.title: Counting Cars: Chrome Is Where the Heart Is
programme.desc: Danny tries to get the derailed '62 Caddy project back on track, while Ryan tries to make amends for a mishap by finding a flip or two for the shop.

programme.title: The Simpsons: 101 Mitigations
programme.desc: After Homer steals Comic Book Guy's car, he must either prove his innocence in court or reconcile with the jilted nerd.

programme.title: The Simpsons: I Want You (She's So Heavy)
programme.desc: When a romantic night ends in injury, Marge recovers by taking up kite boarding while Homer bonds with his hallucinated hernia. Lisa attempts to fix her parents' strained relationship by seeking advice from an unlikely source.

programme.title: The Simpsons: E My Sports
programme.desc: As Bart begins to excel in video game competitions, Homer discovers a passion for coaching him. Lisa attempts to bring Homer back to reality, but the plan causes chaos.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Girl's in the Band

programme.title: The Simpsons: I'm Just a Girl Who Can't Say D'oh

programme.title: The Simpsons: Woo-Hoo Dunnit

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: The Taking of Funtime One Two Three

programme.title: Archer: Archer Vice: Filibuster

programme.title: Archer: Archer Vice: Arrivals/ Departures

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crickets

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Q-Pay
programme.desc: The guys kill time in a waiting room by sharing some TMI texts with strangers, then try to sabotage each other as the wingmen from hell at a dating event. Tonight's big loser gets a very special donation from one of the other Jokers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rubbed the Wrong Way
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr cruise the food court sending texts to strangers, then throw caution, and groceries, to the wind. And tonight's loser is cast as a genie in a play but wishes he could be anywhere else.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Flatfoot the Pirate

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Remember the Pact
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q beg shoppers to hold on to a weird item, then teach tech to seniors. Tonight's loser reveals his embarrassing digital life to his dad.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Silence of the Lame

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Walking Dread

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Night Out

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Little Bugs
programme.desc: Adam uncovers the benefits of spiders, serves up knowledge on why we should be eating more bugs as a protein source, and illustrates the benefits of little bugs on your gut health.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Cops
programme.desc: Adam looks at the truth behind the overuse of SWAT Teams, illustrates how using school officers can create a pipeline for prisons, and examines the origins and intended purpose of police officers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Medium, Well Done
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q, and Joe pose as TV execs pitching insane shows, and tonight's big loser undergoes a psychic reading that puts his real life on the wrong track.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Drum and Drummer
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Q and Joe convince shoppers to repeat odd catch phrases, then go mental as psychoanalysts. Plus, tonight's losers perform at a halftime show.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Nature
programme.desc: Adam digs up the dirt on nature, revealing that Mount Everest is a frozen pile of poop, natural disasters are actually man-made, and there is no such thing as untouched wilderness.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins the Wild West
programme.desc: Adam illustrates how, despite its macho man reputation, prostitutes actually helped settle the West. He then goes on to explain why the 'All-American Cowboy' is a myth, and that the real hero of the west wasn't a person at all - it was air conditioning.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Justice
programme.desc: After getting Emily out of prison, Adam and his sister Rhea take on the justice system, shining a spotlight on the infamous McDonalds hot coffee lawsuit, and the substantial problems with the jury duty system.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Weight Loss
programme.desc: Adam illustrates all the reasons low-fat diets can actually make you fatter, and why counting calories is a waste of time.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins College
programme.desc: Adam shares why becoming a dropout billionaire is unlikely and how school rankings have little to do with education quality. Plus, student loans.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Cops
programme.desc: Adam looks at the truth behind the overuse of SWAT Teams, illustrates how using school officers can create a pipeline for prisons, and examines the origins and intended purpose of police officers.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Drugs
programme.desc: Adam weeds through the myths of marijuana, exposes the blunt truth about the War on Drugs, and explains how prescription pills are the true gateway drug.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Housing
programme.desc: While looking for a new home, Adam exposes the harsh realities of real estate. Plus, he explains why helping the homeless is a lot simpler than you think.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Immigration
programme.desc: Adam illustrates the big problem a border wall wouldn't address, explores the history of racist deportations, and explains how immigration courts are a huge mess.

programme.desc: Hidden beneath the ocean’s surface lies a secret Eden where ancient species still thrive in dazzling abundance.

programme.title: Wild Japan: Fiery Heart
programme.desc: Michelle Dockery narrates this wildlife special about Japan’s largest island.

programme.title: Wild Japan: The Enchanted Deep
programme.desc: Explore the unique chain of islands stretching 750 miles off the tip of mainland Japan.

programme.title: Wild Japan: Island on the Edge
programme.desc: Explore Hokkaido, Japan’s northernmost, wildest and most hostile island.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Don't Mess With Texas
programme.desc: Game Wardens search for an endangered Whooping Crane. A local beauty shop owner finds an injured baby hawk. Wardens respond to a call about a nuisance alligator and suspicions of a deer poacher arise.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: In the Nick of Time
programme.desc: Texas Summer has Game Wardens Chelsea and Ben rushing to a call about a capsized canoe. Game Warden Deschaaf investigates a trapped deer that leads to more questions than answers. At Canyon Lake, Game Wardens assist in the arrest of a man with a warrant.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Crossing the Line
programme.desc: Officer Kevin Bronson races to get a driver under the influence off the road. Officer Eric Hannett catches two teenagers joyriding an ATV on a public road. Up north, Officer Bob Mancini helps evacuate an injured hiker.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Uncuffed: Spring Fever
programme.desc: The action heats up as the weather does and the wardens are out policing park visitors who are getting into all sorts of mischief. If that's not enough they'll also need to wrangle a poisonous snake who's already bitten one victim.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Protect and Preserve: On the Loose
programme.desc: Lt. Boudreau teams up with trainee Masucci to track down a turkey hunter who may have shot from the road. When an animal release goes south, Officer Hannett lends a hand. Then, Officer Canfield races to catch a trespassing dirt biker.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Too Close for Comfort
programme.desc: Officers Arsenault confronts a hunter accused of hunting too close to a school and damaging property.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Uncuffed: Spring Fever
programme.desc: The action heats up as the weather does and the wardens are out policing park visitors who are getting into all sorts of mischief. If that's not enough they'll also need to wrangle a poisonous snake who's already bitten one victim.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Protect and Preserve: On the Loose
programme.desc: Lt. Boudreau teams up with trainee Masucci to track down a turkey hunter who may have shot from the road. When an animal release goes south, Officer Hannett lends a hand. Then, Officer Canfield races to catch a trespassing dirt biker.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Too Close for Comfort
programme.desc: Officers Arsenault confronts a hunter accused of hunting too close to a school and damaging property.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Mud Season
programme.desc: The wardens investigate several accidents caused by the mud, including rescuing a boy who was caught in a flash flood. Also, Parker investigates an ATV hit-and-run.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Summer Heats Up
programme.desc: Summer has arrived and people are filling up the woods and causing trouble. MacCabe finds a campsite where the occupants seem to have vanished, and the wardens search for a pot grow op after a drug deal went wrong.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Casper: The White Crocodile
programme.desc: Steve and his team relocate 11 of the feistiest crocodiles to their new pond at the zoo.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Kittens in Wonderland
programme.desc: Tabby kittens and a bearded dragon, a group of Burmese kittens go on an adventure and the runt of a litter of Siberian kittens plays with a miniature horse.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Fluffy's Last Stand
programme.desc: A mother and daughter are being torn apart by their cat, Missy, who's determined to kill their other cat Fluffy. Jackson meets a tortie named Candy, who's beating up a nine-year-old because she isn't so sweet.

programme.title: Dr. Dee: Alaska Vet: Against All Odds
programme.desc: Dr. Terry operates on a dog that was viciously attacked; Dr. Dee helps a lovesick turtle and performs a pregnancy check for a rancher.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: A Brave Little Dog
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff treats a dog with a mysterious injury. Dr. Petra helps vet tech Jess' Dalmatian after it eats something toxic. A neglected turtle needs a new home, and the team falls in love with a litter of stray kittens.

programme.title: The Zoo: Kangaroo Dave
programme.desc: Dave, a kangaroo suffering from chronic arthritis, tries cryotherapy. A large group of rambunctious gharials are trained to patiently wait for their food. And, a tiny pygmy marmoset gives birth to an even tinier baby.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Save the Elephants
programme.desc: An elephant family has a potentially deadly virus affecting animals in captivity and in the wild. With the youngest members of the family most at risk, the keepers and the zoo's veterinary team must do all they can to combat the mysterious illness.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Pressure Cooker
programme.desc: Villalobos faces one of their most challenging rescues when a house fire reveals a massive dog-hoarding situation. Two teachers fall in love with a deaf puppy they hope to give a forever home.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Fire Dog
programme.desc: A potential best friend needs to pass a unique test before he can be adopted out. Parolee Jammall returns after a mysterious absence. A year after losing their house in a fire, M2 and Kanani do something special for the dog who saved their lives.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Invisible Assassin
programme.desc: Diver Tim Saxon is filming underwater at the Great Barrier Reef when an Irukandji jellyfish, one of the world's most venomous animals, stings him. Forester George Knoll is working in the remote Great Bear Rainforest when a grizzly bear attacks.

programme.title: I Was Prey: Grisly Encounters
programme.desc: Jordan Carbery is investigating a noise outside his cabin and encounters a massive grizzly bear. Days before their destination-wedding celebration, Zanele Fox and her husband take a river tour when she is thrown from her raft and ravaged by a crocodile.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Amazon Ghost Town
programme.desc: An American ghost town in the Amazon jungle, a secret Nazi base, and a deadly concrete fortress 866 miles long are mysterious deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Haunting on Plague Island
programme.desc: A strange complex of buildings on a remote tropical island was once home to a large seaside community, but today, locals avoid the area and claim that it's haunted. New discoveries reveal why this eerie place was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Alien Hell Portal
programme.desc: A strange complex of tunnels on the grounds of a bizarre mansion was under lock-and-key for a century, and since its rediscovery, some believe its mysterious place is a gate to hell. New discoveries reveal its secret purpose and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Aliens in America
programme.desc: Investigations into strange occurrences caught on camera.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of the Mayan Treasure
programme.desc: An explorer searching for treasure at a Mayan sacrificial site is attacked by a mysterious underwater fog. Thousands of fish spontaneously jump to their deaths. Something alien appears over the skies of Lost Angeles.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Doomsday at Yellowstone
programme.desc: Evidence of ghostly apparitions is captured at a Civil War battlefield. When mysterious blue fires start near Yellowstone, experts worry if a super volcano eruption is imminent. Near the site of the Salem witch trials, an eerie spectacle stuns scientists.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Ghost in the Abyss
programme.desc: A deep-ocean expedition discovers unnerving evidence of an alien-like monster stirring in the abyss. When an apocalyptic shockwave is caught on tape, investigators wonder if a meteor has hit a city. Something bizarre is happening in a Siberian ice river.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of the Mayan Treasure
programme.desc: An explorer searching for treasure at a Mayan sacrificial site is attacked by a mysterious underwater fog. Thousands of fish spontaneously jump to their deaths. Something alien appears over the skies of Lost Angeles.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Return of the Witch
programme.desc: When something strange is recorded flying in Mexico, some wonder if it's a witch reputed to kidnap children, and others believe it's evidence of a new way to smuggle drugs or a top-secret technology.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Nazi Stonehenge
programme.desc: A mysterious Stonehenge-like structure in Russia might have links to the Nazis. Experts uncover clues to a mega-tsunami with the power to devastate the United States. A huge lake appears in the Sahara overnight, and its explanation could be mythical.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Raiders of the Holy Lance
programme.desc: A heavily armored force takes over one of Syria's most ancient archaeology sites, prompting fears that its relics are being stolen. Tanks appear to be facing off in Antarctica next to an unworldly object. A water reservoir in LA suddenly turns black.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Mafia Ghost Ship
programme.desc: A ghost ship with links to the mob suddenly appears on a California beach. Strange markings could be a coded message that reveals a plot to overthrow the Queen of England. A lake believed to have magical healing powers holds clues to life on Mars.

programme.title: What on Earth?: The Minotaur's Lair
programme.desc: A strange lake in Transylvania is the home of an abandoned village, and a terrifying secret. When an labyrinth is discovered on an island once home to an ancient Greek civilization, experts investigate if it was the legendary home of the Minotaur.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Ghost Ship of Hell Island
programme.desc: A ghost ship is found abandoned on a remote island that's home to one of the world's last uncontacted tribes. A strange labyrinth in Sicily might have a sinister connection to the Mafia. New evidence reveals a mysterious military compound in Russia.

programme.title: What on Earth?: North Korea's Forbidden Islands
programme.desc: Man-made islands are spotted near a North Korean missile facility. When something unexpected is found in a remote desert, experts investigate a lost city of giants. A strange discovery in Siberia could reveal a secret mission to the center of the earth.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Mystery of the Great Pyramid
programme.desc: Egypt's Great Pyramid is one of the most mysterious sites on the planet, and now, a team armed with cutting-edge technology and a brand-new discovery uncovers a secret that will rewrite the history books.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Mystery of the Great Pyramid
programme.desc: Egypt's Great Pyramid is one of the most mysterious sites on the planet, and now, a team armed with cutting-edge technology and a brand-new discovery uncovers a secret that will rewrite the history books.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Egypt's Buried Wonders
programme.desc: Archaeologists and NASA have teamed up to use cutting-edge satellite technology in search of the lost pyramids, cities, and treasures that, until now, were undiscovered, as Ancient Egypt's greatest secrets might still be buried beneath the sand.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Egypt's Buried Wonders
programme.desc: Archaeologists and NASA have teamed up to use cutting-edge satellite technology in search of the lost pyramids, cities, and treasures that, until now, were undiscovered, as Ancient Egypt's greatest secrets might still be buried beneath the sand.

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Hunt for Noah's Ark
programme.desc: According to the Bible, Noah's Ark was a world-changing engineering feat, and it took cutting-edge construction to build it. Experts use the latest tech and modern-day science to reveal if building it a second time would be just as difficult.

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Doomsday in Venice
programme.desc: Venice is a city in crisis and it took dangerous, cutting-edge engineering to build it. As apocalyptic floodwaters unleash havoc, experts use the latest tech and modern-day science to reveal if building it a second time would be just as deadly.

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Ghosts of the Colosseum
programme.desc: Rome's Colosseum is the most famous stadium on the planet, and it took cutting-edge engineering and a fallen emperor to build it. Experts use the latest tech and modern-day science to reveal if building it a second time would be just as difficult.

programme.title: Female Forces: Red Alert
programme.desc: Betsy, Julie and Tracy release some aggression and train for hand-to-hand combat with their nightstick batons. Officer Dawn Yorke deals with a belligerent homeless man accused of casing a parking lot for possible theft.

programme.title: Female Forces: Crash Makeover
programme.desc: Betsy and Officer Julie Lardino convince Officer Tracy to undergo a head-to-toe makeover while still keeping the city safe.

programme.title: Female Forces: For Better or for Worse
programme.desc: Officer Dawn Yorke tries to settle domestic dispute with a wife who refuses to let her abusive husband back into their home. Next, Sgt. Betsy Brantner-Smith gives a good lecture to a husband who gets pulled over after bickering with his wife.

programme.title: Paranormal Cops: Victim's Revenge
programme.desc: The team finds that a young girl's suicide in 1916 could have been a murder and that her aggressor is still hanging around the campus hoping to find his next victim.

programme.title: Paranormal Cops: Dead Man Walking
programme.desc: CPD are called in by the Frankfort Fire Department to investigate strange occurrences in the firehouse.

programme.title: Paranormal Cops: Messages from Beyond
programme.desc: A police officer calls Ron to help him uncover the mysteries surrounding his night job as a security officer at a banquet hall.

programme.title: Paranormal Cops: Meagan's Ghost
programme.desc: A concerned homeowner contacts CPD when her houseguest is choked in her sleep by an unseen force.

programme.title: Female Forces: Irish Luck

programme.title: American Justice: Death of a Bride
programme.desc: In September 1999, a New Jersey woman is murdered by her ex-boyfriend on her wedding day.

programme.title: American Justice: Cops on Trial
programme.desc: Police officers and the general public are held to different standards of justice.

programme.title: Nightwatch Nation: Back from the Brink
programme.desc: Baton Rouge paramedics rush to the aid of a man attacked by his girlfriend with a box-cutter knife. Gunshots fired in Yonkers send Ariel and Cunningham to save a man down. In Austin, first responders plead with a patient to go to the hospital.

programme.title: Nightwatch Nation: We Are Nightwatch Nation
programme.desc: Patrick and Danelle from Yonkers, New York, go above and beyond to help a schizophrenic patient who's had a hard time being taken seriously in the past. Far away in Austin, Texas, Holly and Chris have a scary run-in with poison control.

programme.title: Monstresses: Katie Belflower & Brandita Taliano
programme.desc: 2003, Livermore, California: 17-year old Katie Bellflower seduces a high school classmate's husband, 20-year old Mike Simons. The young Monstress is willing to kill not just once--but twice--to keep Simons to herself.

programme.title: Monstresses: Diana Haun & Morgan Hughes
programme.desc: In 1996, Ventura, California, 32 year old supermarket clerk Diana Haun thinks she has met her soul mate in co-worker Michael Dally when the two start a steamy affair. Diane decides to do whatever it takes to get rid of Michael's wife, Sherri.

programme.title: Monstresses: Elizabeth Reynolds & Linda Henning
programme.desc: In 2003 Kingsville, Texas, Elizabeth Reynolds claims she's divorced when she gets involved with 39-year-old Al Benitez. But when he finds out she's still married, he tries to break it off. She goes berserk and hires a man to get her revenge on Al.

programme.title: Grace vs. Abrams
programme.desc: Nancy Grace and Dan Abrams debate infamous crimes and legal cases.

programme.title: Marcia Clark Investigates The First 48: Drew Peterson
programme.desc: Marcia Clark investigates the disappearance of 23-year-old mother of four, Stacy Peterson, who vanished without a trace. All eyes began to focus on her cop husband Drew Peterson when it was learned his previous wife died suspiciously.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: The Green Eyed Monster
programme.desc: In December 1998, Peter Theriault, 51, fails to arrive for his shift at a car plant in Commerce City, California. Pete hasn't missed a day of work in almost three decades. Friends and family immediately suspect something is very wrong.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Driving with the Devil
programme.desc: A car pulls into a Long Island gas station with a mother shot dead in the front seat. Her husband claims a stranger shot her on the highway, but he's foggy on the details. Is this a case of deadly road rage, or does he know more than he's telling?

programme.title: The Perfect Murder: Bizarre Love Triangle
programme.desc: Ann returns home from shopping to find her husband, Anthony, lifeless in bed, a gun beside him. Police soon find a second victim, Jacqueline Riggs, in the basement, stabbed to death. What happened here is a dark tale of love, lust and violence.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Scene of the Crime
programme.desc: When Brad McGarry is discovered murdered in his Ohio basement, residents in this sleepy coalmining town are left in shock. Detectives suspect robbery but then a friend comes forward and points them in the direction of someone whom they least expected.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Fatal Facade
programme.desc: When two teenage girls fall in love, their hedonistic lifestyle is played out on social media for all to see. Behind the façade, petty jealousies and insecurities escalate until finally the pressure erupts in a frenzy of shocking violence.

programme.title: Valley of the Damned: The Second Shot
programme.desc: When Dianne Hood is gunned down outside a community center in Prison Valley, no one can understand why anyone would want to murder the well-liked housewife. The answer involves betrayal, greed and obsession, in an infamous love-triangle murder plot.

programme.title: Valley of the Damned: The Kill List
programme.desc: Prison Valley is rocked by the murder of Prisons Chief Tom Clements. The cops think it's part of a wider plot, and they're running out of time to catch the killer.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Fatal Facade
programme.desc: When two teenage girls fall in love, their hedonistic lifestyle is played out on social media for all to see. Behind the façade, petty jealousies and insecurities escalate until finally the pressure erupts in a frenzy of shocking violence.

programme.title: Valley of the Damned: The Second Shot
programme.desc: When Dianne Hood is gunned down outside a community center in Prison Valley, no one can understand why anyone would want to murder the well-liked housewife. The answer involves betrayal, greed and obsession, in an infamous love-triangle murder plot.

programme.title: Valley of the Damned: The Kill List
programme.desc: Prison Valley is rocked by the murder of Prisons Chief Tom Clements. The cops think it's part of a wider plot, and they're running out of time to catch the killer.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Scene of the Crime
programme.desc: When Brad McGarry is discovered murdered in his Ohio basement, residents in this sleepy coalmining town are left in shock. Detectives suspect robbery but then a friend comes forward and points them in the direction of someone whom they least expected.

programme.title: Dead of Night: That's My Brother
programme.desc: Two murders just one year apart have the police of Great Falls, Montana on high alert. Morris Davis and Suzette Pritchard are the victims of brutal overkill, leading police to believe there is a killer is on the loose. But one tip changes everything.

programme.title: Dead of Night: Back From the Dead
programme.desc: In Baltimore, Maryland, a calculating predator lies in wait, stalking innocent young women and striking when they are most vulnerable... alone at night. But a surprise is in store when one of the victims turns out to be the killer's own worst enemy.

programme.title: Dead of Night: Writing on the Wall
programme.desc: In 2002, the brutal double homicide of Sam Holley and Arica Schneider sends shockwaves throughout the small town of Troy, NY. After a 5 year investigation, Sam and Arica's killers seem to be brought to justice, until a shocking twist changes everything.

programme.title: Dead of Night: Panic Room
programme.desc: A young woman with a promising future vanishes from her apartment in the middle of the night. Family and friends search desperately for any sign of her, but the truth will only come to light after a grisly crime is committed just miles away.

programme.title: Dead of Night: Heat of the Night
programme.desc: While alone in her office late at night, successful Baton Rouge defense attorney Chiquita Tate is brutally murdered. Police quickly zero in on a prime suspect until a twisted conspiracy from Chiquita's past comes to light.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Secrets of the Mesa
programme.desc: Convicted of killing his wife in 2004, a Colorado man gets a second shot at freedom.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Mortician, the Murder, the Movie
programme.desc: A mortician may have killed and frozen a widow to live off of her millions or it may have been a desperate act to end abuse.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Murder in the Mansion
programme.desc: It was one of the most notorious cases in Texas history, an ambush in a lavish mansion that left two people wounded and two people dead, one of them a child. To this day, on one has been held accountable.

programme.title: Homicide City: The Professor's Wife
programme.desc: When Ellen Robb's husband finds her murdered in their quiet suburban Philadelphia home, evidence initially points to a robbery gone wrong. But as police dig deeper into the couple's life, they learn the motive may be far more sinister.

programme.title: Homicide City: Nine Months Murdered
programme.desc: When expectant mother Natise Johnson is found murdered days before she is due to give birth to her first child, Philly detectives focus on those closest to her. But soon they find Natise's life is much more complicated than anyone ever knew.

programme.title: Homicide City: Killer Moves
programme.desc: When beloved a DJ, Alberto Martino, is found bludgeoned to death outside his radio station, it's appears to be a robbery gone wrong. But police quickly learn the Martino was not a random victim, but the focus of a carefully orchestrated homicide.

programme.title: Homicide City: Pine Hill Massacre
programme.desc: When Bill and Catherine Stuart are executed in their home along with their three-year-old daughter, police look to the surviving daughter Miriam for clues. Her description of the killer leads detectives deep into Philadelphia's criminal underworld.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: City of Fear
programme.desc: When a spate of violent robberies spreads terror across the city, Kenda and the major crimes unit are called in to bring the masked gunman to justice. But when the brazen bandit strikes yet again, it looks as if Kenda's case is going down in flames.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Patriots and Presidents
programme.desc: Learn the truth behind some of America's most powerful men and the birth of the country they governed.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Civil War
programme.desc: From a secret society that gathers in the dead of night and plots the assassination of Abraham Lincoln, to U.S. spymaster Alan Pinkerton who stops Confederate agents, the outcome of the Civil War is often decided by spies.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Pearl Harbor was a day that changed American history and life forever. But was the attack really a surprise? What did FDR know about the attack beforehand? An investigation into who really fired the first shots of the Pacific War?

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Gold
programme.desc: A look at the history of gold, where most of it resides today and who owns it.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Secret Prisons
programme.desc: The dark history of America's Secret Prisons is revealed.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Code Wars
programme.desc: American code breakers have given the United States an edge in every conflict in American history. Now, with encryption available for technological devices, U.S. code warriors have a new obstacle to manuever in exposing their enemies.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: The Vatican
programme.desc: The Vatican is a secretive, watchful institution that protects its reputation and the members of its ranks with fierce, often reckless abandon. The secrets and scandals throughout its history are some of the darkest.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Secret Prisons
programme.desc: The dark history of America's Secret Prisons is revealed.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Code Wars
programme.desc: American code breakers have given the United States an edge in every conflict in American history. Now, with encryption available for technological devices, U.S. code warriors have a new obstacle to manuever in exposing their enemies.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: The Vatican
programme.desc: The Vatican is a secretive, watchful institution that protects its reputation and the members of its ranks with fierce, often reckless abandon. The secrets and scandals throughout its history are some of the darkest.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Gold
programme.desc: A look at the history of gold, where most of it resides today and who owns it.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Colombian Rambo
programme.desc: In 1980 the trickle of cocaine coming in to Florida suddenly becomes a flood and drug wars erupt on the streets. Carlos Lehder is behind it all. The DEA must take him down before he destroys the USA with the drug he calls Latin America's 'atomic bomb'.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: American Gangster
programme.desc: Frank Lucas was one of the most successful heroin dealers of the 1970's. His brand of heroin known as 'Blue Magic' was notorious on the streets of New York and New Jersey.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Waking the Beast
programme.desc: On December 7, 1941 Japan gambles all and attacks the US. In the first months of the war it looks as though Japan is unbeatable until the US fights back. The War in the Pacific engulfs Asia and launches an entirely new form of naval warfare.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Island Warfare
programme.desc: By the summer of 1942, the US has the upper hand in the war with Japan. It has achieved naval superiority. In the spring of 1945 the loss of life is great for both sides but Japan refuses to surrender. US Chiefs desperately look for a way to end the way.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: No Surrender
programme.desc: The war is turning America's way. Yet Japan is determined to kill as many Americans as possible and fight to the death. The US must determine if it has the stomach for the fight, or if there is a secret weapon that offers a quick way out.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Rangers Lead the Way
programme.desc: United States Army Rangers spearhead one of the biggest amphibious landings in history: the Allied invasion of France. They must scale vertical cliffs before facing the enemy, then destroy the guns that threaten to blow the Allied forces out of the water.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Mountain Massacre
programme.desc: The Black Devils, a joint American-Canadian mountain warfare unit, are about to go into action. They must mount a do-or-die night-time assault up a treacherous mountain, in extreme weather, to take on heavily-entrenched battle hardened German defenses.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Hitler's Last Bridge
programme.desc: A brave band of regular GI's are tasked with saving the last bridge and final gateway to the Third Reich. The bridge is bristling with German guns loaded with explosives. Worse, the enemy plan to destroy the bridge if the American unit assaults it.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Strike From the Sky
programme.desc: British light infantry must crash land by glider in Northern France then take and hold two key bridges in the hands of a heavily armed enemy.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: SAS vs. Rommel
programme.desc: The SAS launches a daring raid behind enemy lines on a German airfield in the Sahara Desert. If they succeed in destroying Rommel's supply planes, their action could turn the tide of war and allow the British to drive the Germans out of North Africa.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Commando Do or Die
programme.desc: British commandos attempt a head-on amphibious assault against a heavily-defended enemy port. Their mission is to take out the dock facilities of St. Nazaire before they become a base for Germany's biggest battleship.

programme.title: The Mafia Kingpin

programme.title: Buying and Selling With the Property Brothers: Room to Grow

programme.title: Buying and Selling With the Property Brothers: Getting Out of the City
programme.desc: Danielle and Steve bought what they thought was the perfect suburban home, but then their jobs shifted, they had two kids, and now they're ready to move into a sprawling house even further from the city.

programme.title: Buying and Selling With the Property Brothers: A Number-One Hit Property
programme.desc: Nashville musicians Lee Roy and Lisa want to blend their families and move in together. Before they can buy their dream home, though, they need to transform his tired old property into a number-one hit on the real estate market.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Twin Capes Ferry
programme.desc: The crew heads to Norfolk, VA, to test their sea legs and salvage an obsolete ferry including lights, skylights and a mural. Back at the shop, Grayson helps Mike and Tay with a commissioned build for a fellow maker.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Return To K-Town
programme.desc: Mike and Tay build a commemorative clock for the town of Kannapolis, North Carolina, before the crew heads back to salvage items left behind on the first trip, including a large cupola, windows and a bank vault.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Smoky Mountain Homestead
programme.desc: A family of five builds a forever home on their 46-acre property overlooking the Smoky Mountains.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Desert Mountain House
programme.desc: A creative family builds a custom home where the mountains and desert collide in Colorado's last frontier. The dream project quickly turns into a job when the harsh terrain combines with the demanding pace they've set for themselves.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: High Altitude Hideout

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Colorado Mountain Lodges
programme.desc: A Colorado couple attempts to build one of the most energy-efficient homesteads in the state. Mother Nature and bleeding edge technologies give them a run for their money as they race to complete their high-end alpine lodge before winter hits.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Tiny Forest Cottage
programme.desc: New York newlyweds escape the city to build their first home upstate in a secluded part of the Hudson Valley. Utilizing timber felled from their own property, they plan to craft their own tiny house completely off the grid.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Vail Log Cabin
programme.desc: The Walker family rebuilds their 100 year old mining cabin in the Colorado wilderness. Fortunately, they're a family of engineers who are game for any challenges. The tools used for this project will be as old as the cabin itself!

programme.title: Miami Flip: Lighten Up!
programme.desc: Carolina buys a new house in an online auction, sight unseen. She kicks off the renovations by breaking through brick walls to bring in the light and completely gutting out the kitchen.

programme.title: I Hate My Kitchen: How To Reuse And Repurpose In A Modern Classic Kitchen Reno
programme.desc: Licensed contractor James Young helps a young couple turn their ugly, dated, 1980s kitchen into a modern classic space.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Copper Showstopper
programme.desc: Tamara continues renovations on the ranch by creating a new master suite. While polishing the copper fireplace hood, Tamara and her dad use a familiar solution that has unusual results. Her plans to create a sunroom run into problems due to weather.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: From Studs to Spindles
programme.desc: Tamara Day steps in to finish the renovation of a 1890s Craftsman-style home. This home was previously ripped down to the studs by a contractor before it was abandoned.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Book Lamps and Bubble Glass
programme.desc: Renovations on the 1890s Craftsman-style home continues as Tamara enlarges the master bedroom and creates a beautiful study. She runs into trouble when the antique tiles for the bathroom floor are not salvageable. Tamara finds a way to re-use old glass.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: All Bricked Out
programme.desc: Tamara takes an 1892 brick Craftsman that was converted into three apartments and tries to restore it back into a single-family dwelling while keeping original details.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: The Swing of Things
programme.desc: Tamara continues working on an 1892 Craftsman and struggles to add a master bathroom. Then, she finds a way to repurpose floor boards into a porch swing, but her plan to reuse a clawfoot tub hits a snag because of a narrow doorway.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Fireplaces and Wired Spaces
programme.desc: Tamara annexes an oversized dining room to enlarge a tiny kitchen in a 1926 English Tudor. She rips out an outdated and tacky mantel to create a stunning fireplace surround, and then creates a large desktop for an in-home office.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Two-deck Tudor
programme.desc: Tamara struggles to create a more spacious master suite until she decides to add a second deck to a 1926 English Tudor. In the backyard, she adds an outdoor living area with a fire pit. She and her dad then realize the garage doors may cause a problem.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Corbels and Chaos
programme.desc: Tamara sees great potential in a 1938 cottage with an unusual layout, unfinished renovation and no front door. She constructs a cathedral ceiling and creates two cedar corbels for the entrance. The cost of an egress window may crack her budget.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Skylight Surprise
programme.desc: Tamara struggles to install a full bath and enlarge the master suite as she continues to renovate the 1938 cottage. She successfully creates a hidden playroom in the kids' bedroom, but fails to win her dad's approval on her plan for the backyard shed.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Bungalow Brickwork
programme.desc: Working to restore a 1920's bungalow, Nicole must tackle a ton of brickwork, including the need to rebuild the front steps after years of water damage.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Master Suite Madness
programme.desc: Nicole picks up where the old owner left off and creates a master suite in the attic.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Water Damaged Kitchen
programme.desc: Nicole repairs the water-damaged kitchen, keeping the original wall sink.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Everything We Had Leftover
programme.desc: To complete her bungalow rehab, Nicole must finish the remaining rooms.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: A Tale of Two Houses
programme.desc: Nicole is back in action and juggling two Detroit houses at the same time. While the Ferndale house is in great shape, the 14 Mile property is gutted of its original fixtures and charm. Ferndale serves as the inspiration for renovations at 14 Mile.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Close Quarters
programme.desc: Nicole tackles a 1920s house that used to be a rental and has incredibly small upstairs bedrooms. She plans to change the layout and add character, including removing a wall to make room for a new hallway and custom linen closet.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Master Bath Miracle
programme.desc: Nicole finds that turning a tiny, dated bathroom into an en suite master bath isn't easy as she struggles to fit a soaking tub, shower and custom vanity in the space to give it stately, historic appeal.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Maximizing the Master Suite
programme.desc: Nicole has almost completed the upstairs in her 14-Mile house. Now it's to time to unveil a bigger and brighter master bedroom. To get the look she wants, she has to knock down some walls, open up the ceiling and bring in a very special feature.

programme.title: Chopped: Beast Feast
programme.desc: The competitors face off in a protein-packed battle, even featuring some fierce ingredients that are too big for the baskets. In a fast and loud appetizer round, the blenders are booming as the chefs try to make meaty appetizers with a creative touch.

programme.title: Chopped: Wild Game Plan
programme.desc: The competitors work with game meat in every round, starting with wild boar. Black Forest cake is the sweet dessert.

programme.title: Chopped: A Very Piggy Halloween
programme.desc: The chefs have to cook with snouts in the first round of the Halloween-themed competition.

programme.title: Chopped: Best Halloween Ever
programme.desc: Four one-of-a-kind cooks have dressed up for Halloween in the Chopped Kitchen, and the judges are eager to see what a drag queen, a witch, a medieval re-enactor and a bloody-faced warrior will cook.

programme.title: Chopped: Horror Flick Halloween
programme.desc: In a Halloween-themed competition, the four chefs face ingredient baskets packed with nods to horror movies, which guest judge and actor Rose McGowan knows well.

programme.title: Chopped: Halloween Hijinks
programme.desc: Martha Stewart is thrilled to celebrate her favorite holiday, Halloween, as a judge in the Chopped kitchen. All manner of spooky fun is found in the first basket, including a scary sight in a martini glass and macaroni and cheese in a clever package.

programme.title: Chopped: Mummies and Gummies
programme.desc: In the first basket, a freaky gummy and a funny mummy hit on the Halloween theme. In the second round, chefs find some scary offal and more gummy goodness.

programme.desc: At an age when many kids have never even tasted lamb, the junior chefs competing must create dishes with it in round one. A creamy soup and a pretty pasta are two of the entree basket ingredients that the young cooks must conquer.

programme.title: Farmhouse Rules: The Bowlerinas
programme.desc: Nancy prepares cream cheese stuffed French toast and sausage bacon hash with baked tomatoes.

programme.title: Farmhouse Rules: Book Drive at the Barn
