programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Hearted
programme.desc: After a man dies with no proof of foul play, investigators learn that another man died the exact same way six years earlier. The men had one thing in common: at the time of their deaths, they were married to the same woman.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wheel of Misfortune
programme.desc: A woman's disappearance is tracked by a casino's security cameras. Investigators collect enough evidence left behind from the victim to inform them of who was responsible and how she disappeared.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Gambler
programme.desc: To solve a case of triple homicide, investigators have to delve into the world of high rollers and offshore betting. With the help of forensics, they are able to bring down a killer who gambled, and lost.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Weakest Link
programme.desc: There are no clues to identify a body found along a rural road. Even after a determined detective finds the 'key' to identifying her, it takes a close analysis of a tire tread and a broken piece of jewellery to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Going for Broke
programme.desc: A Russian immigrant stockbroker is found dead and a strange phone call to his office is the only clue investigators have to go on - until they're led to a client who's made some bad investments, and a dog that sheds a little more than his owner realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Just Desserts
programme.desc: A Florida couple is found dead just days before their planned move out of state. A known criminal's driver's license found at the crime scene seems too good to be true.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Penchant for Poison
programme.desc: Three seemingly unrelated deaths proved to be serial murders. The killer had been careful; he used poison which has no taste or odor. Fortunately for investigators, it also had a unique chemical signature.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bump in the Night
programme.desc: Investigators find a shoe impression in the mud outside a victim's home that they hope will lead them to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Insignificant Others
programme.desc: A man's wife had taken her own life, and his college sweetheart had killed herself in much the same fashion fourteen years earlier. Investigators had to determine if this was a coincidence or an attempt to get away with murder twice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Catch 22

programme.desc: After a series of mishaps, Teddy finally tries to go on a date with Kai while Charlie stays busy learning a dance that is part of the Kahunas Kiddie Club. Amy starts to slowly believe that a curse has been bestowed upon her, so she sets out to undo it.

programme.title: Good Luck Charlie: Alley Oops

programme.desc: Blaze, AJ, and Gabby meet a brand-new monster machine named Watts, a super fast truck with electric tires. When one of her special tires goes rolling into the jungle, Blaze, AJ, and Gabby promise to help her get it back.

programme.title: Ricky Zoom: The Most Amazing Thing Put in a Box Ever/ The New Rescue Tool
programme.desc: Worried that he always messes things up, Loop is determined to be true to his word. Ricky accidentally mistakes his dad's new rescue ramp as a toy from a breakfast cereal contest.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups in a Jam/ Pups Save a Windsurfing Pig
programme.desc: It's the annual Jamboree Jamfest, but all of the fruit is carried off by ants. It's up to the pups to lure the ants to safety. Zuma is on a wacky water rescue after Cornelius the pig goes for a ride on a windsurfing board.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save a Giant Plant/ Pups Get Stuck
programme.desc: Ryder and the pups must rescue the Mayor and her chicken from a giant plant. Later, Marshall's fire truck becomes mysteriously magnetized.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Best Day Ever/ The Gift of Gum
programme.desc: Spongebob is going to have the best day ever, until all of his friends have problems; It's Best Friends Day, so Spongebob and Patrick trade Best Friend presents.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Life Insurance/ Burst Your Bubble
programme.desc: After a misunderstanding, SpongeBob and Patrick try to prove their life insurance protects them from any danger. When SpongeBob blows himself a bubble boat, everyone in town wants one. Everyone except Mrs. Puff, that is.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob vs. the Patty Gadget/ Money Talks
programme.desc: SpongeBob competes against a patty-making machine; Mr. Krabs' money tells him to spend it.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Jelly Fishing/ Plankton
programme.desc: Spongebob and Patrick take Squidward jelly fishing; Spongebob falls for Plankton's scheme.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Squid's Day Off/ Suctioncup Symphony
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs takes the day off from the Krusty Krab and puts Squid in charge for the day. The Bikini Bottom Symphony is accepting submissions for their composition contest.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krusty Towers/ Krabs vs. Plankton
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs turns the Krusty Krabs into an upscale hotel where the customer is king. When Plankton slips and falls on some water at the Krusty Krab, he sues Mr. Krabs.

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World: Legend of Isla Nublar: The Secret Exhibit
programme.desc: Simon Masrani has tasked his newly hired assistant, Claire Dearing, to deliver a trio of dinosaurs to Jurassic World's new super-secret exhibit! Unfortunately, Owen Grady, the animal behaviorist Claire hired to deliver the dinosaurs, is late.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Vicky Loses Her Icky/ Pixies Inc.
programme.desc: Timmy wishes for Vicky to be nice; the anti-fun Pixies take over Fairyworld.

programme.desc: Timmy feels sorry for the town's prize goat; everyone becomes the same.

programme.title: Playing Lessons: Cameron Champ
programme.desc: PGA Tour winner Cameron Champ shows how he goes about playing the game. As one of the longest drivers on Tour, Champ takes on a drivable par-4 and explains how he is able to use his distance as a weapon and a strategy on the golf course.

programme.title: Playing Lessons: Pernilla Lingberg
programme.desc: ANA Inspiration champion Pernilla Lindberg hits the golf course with Sean Foley to walk through how she chooses targets in the distance and her strategy for playing par fives. Lindberg also shows how she dials in her wedges and the short game.

programme.title: Playing Lessons: Danny Willett
programme.desc: Masters champion Danny Willett shows how he goes about playing the game. Willett goes in-depth and shows the proper way to choose carry distance to the pin while accounting for the wind. Plus, a look at playing from a divot or behind a tree.

programme.title: Playing Lessons: Jon Rahm
programme.desc: Jon Rahm shows how he uses his supreme power and touch around the greens to go low on the course. Rahm goes in depth to show how to strategically break down long putts into segments for an accurate read.
